兜.hint: Depicts a person with a face (皃) wearing a helmet. Based on the original meaning "helmet worn by warriors". The meaning of this character has shifted over time and now means "pouch".

內.hint: Depicts an entrance (入) to go inside a building (冂).

六.hint: Origin unclear. Various explainations include (1) possibly derives from 入 (enter), with two strokes on the bottom to distinguish it from 入 (enter) or (2) a pictograph of a hut, which is thought to be the original form of 廬. Either way, the current meaning is a phoentic loan.

关.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 門 represents the meaning and 𢇇 represents the sound.  The simplified character 关 was adapted from the cursive form of the traditional character 關. The traditional component 門 was removed for simplification.

億.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 意 represents the sound. Based on the original meaning "quiet; at rest". The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

儒.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 需 represents the sound.

先.hint: Depicts a person (人) stepping forward (止) leading the way.

八.hint: Pictograph of two lines facing away from each other. The current meaning "eight" is a phonetic loan. The original meaning "separate" is now written as 別.

兮.hint: Origin unclear. Likely depicts two lines of air (八) blowing through branches (丂), indicating the sound of wind. Possibly similar in origin to 乎.

僕.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 菐 represents the sound.

儺.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 難 represents the sound.

儿.hint: Simplified form of 兒.  Variant form of 人, a pictograph of a human.

兇.hint: Depicts a person (卩) under a trap (凶).

免.hint: Pictograph of a person wearing a hat or a crown, now written as 冕. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

兩.hint: Combination of two 丙 characters. 丙 also represents the sound.

像.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 象 represents the sound.

兂.hint: Pictograph of a woman kneeling with a hairpin in her hair. Original form of 簪. Not related to 旡 (choke on something eaten).

兴.hint: Depicts four hands (舁) working together (同) to raise something. The simplified character 兴 was adapted from the cursive form of the traditional character 興.

儆.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 敬 represents the sound.

儚.gloss: (J) equivalent to 果敢 U+679C U+6562

優.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 憂 represents the sound.

兀.hint: Depicts a person with the head emphasized, conveying the meaning "stand tall".

入.hint: Arrow pointing forward, representing the idea "enter".

僉.hint: Depicts multiple people (人) opening their mouths (口) to speak together, representing the meaning "together" or "all".

儲.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 諸 represents the sound.

公.hint: Pictograph of a earthen jar for holding liquid, now written as 瓮. The current meaning "public" is a phonetic loan.

兰.hint: Simplified form of 蘭. Phonosemantic compound. 䒑 represents the meaning and 三 represents the sound.

兆.hint: Originally a pictograph of two people escaping a flood. Based on the original meaning "escape", now written as 逃. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

充.hint: Pictograph of an adult person with a hairpin in their hair, indicating being fully grown up into adulthood. In ancient China, adults usually wore a hairpin. Similar in origin to 每.

僑.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 喬 represents the sound.

儼.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 嚴 represents the sound.

光.hint: Pictograph of fire on top of a person.

兄.hint: Pictograph of a mouth on top of a person, representing an older brother giving orders.

全.hint: Depicts jade (玉) that is entirely pure and flawless. Based on the original meaning "pure jade". The meaning later shifted to "complete" and "entire".

僥.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 堯 represents the sound.

僮.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 童 represents the sound.

克.hint: Pictograph of a person (人) carrying a heavy weight on their back.

共.hint: Pictograph of two hands holding up a vessel.

僱.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 雇 represents the sound.

價.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 賈 represents the sound.

儈.hint: A person 亻 who organizes a meeting 會

允.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 㠯 represents the sound and 人 represents the meaning.

元.hint: Pictograph of a person with a line added at the head area, representing the meaning "head" or "first".

兒.hint: Pictograph of a child (人) with an opening in the top of its head (囟). Represents the soft spot (fontanel) at the top of young infant heads. The 囟 component is written like 臼.

兵.hint: Pictograph of two hands (廾) holding a weapon.

僾.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 愛 represents the sound.

僚.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 尞 represents the sound.

僻.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 辟 represents the sound.

儘.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 盡 represents the sound.

兌.hint: Depicts words (八) coming out of a person's (人) mouth (口).

兑.hint: Simplified form of 兌.  Depicts words (八) coming out of a person's (人) mouth (口).

冂.hint: Pictograph of a large room. Original form of 堂.

冒.hint: Pictograph of a hat over an eye. Based on the original meaning "hat". The meaning later shifted to "cover", "feign", "offend", and "risk".

冗.hint: A cover-cloth 冖 on a table 几

准.hint: Simplified form of 準.  Phonosemantic compound. 氵 represents the meaning and 隼 represents the sound. Based on the original meaning "water-level", a tool to check the flatness of surfaces. The meaning later shifted to "accurate", "rule", and "approve".

减.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 冫 represents the meaning and 咸 represents the sound. Simplified form of 減.

几.hint: Pictograph of a small table. In simplified Chinese 几 is also used to mean "how much", while in traditional Chinese this meaning is written with a separate character 幾.

兼.hint: Depicts a hand (又) holding two stalks of grain (禾).

兽.hint: An animal with horns 丷, eyes 田, nose 一, and mouth 口

内.hint: Depicts a  person (人) inside a building (冂).

冕.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 冃 represents the meaning and 免 represents the sound.

冣.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 冖 represents the meaning and 取 represents the sound.

凈.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 冫 represents the meaning and 爭 represents the sound.

典.hint: Depicts two hands (廾) holding a book (冊).

写.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 舄 represents the sound. Based on the original meaning "relocate". The meaning later shifted to "copy" and "write". The simplified character 写 was adapted from the cursive form of the traditional character 寫.

冫.hint: 冫 is a component form of 冰. Pictograph of the texture of ice (i.e. the crystalline lines as seen on ice).

冯.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 马 represents the meaning and 冫 represents the sound. Simplified form of 馮.

册.hint: Simplified form of 冊.  Pictograph of strips of bamboo strung together. In ancient China writing was done on bamboo strips.

冓.hint: Depicts two fish facing each other. Based on the original meaning "meet unexpectedly", now written as 遘.

冡.hint: Depicts a hat (冃) and tiger skin (虎), conveying the meaning "cover" by soldiers who fought covered in tiger skins. The 虎 (tiger) component was later rewritten as 豕 (pig).

净.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 冫 represents the meaning and 争 represents the sound. Simplified form of 淨.

具.hint: Depicts two hands (廾) handling a cooking pot (鼎).

冘.hint: Pictograph of a person carrying a burden or an axe on their shoulder. Same in origin to 何.

冪.hint: A cover 冖 cloth 幕; 冖 also provides the pronunciation

冲.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 冫 represents the meaning and 中 represents the sound. Simplified form of 沖 and 衝.

养.hint: Simplified form of 養.  Phonosemantic compound. 食 represents the meaning and 羊 represents the sound.

冉.hint: Depicts two strands of hair drooping.

兾.gloss: same as 冀 U+5180 to hope for

冁.hint: When an individual 单 opens up 展; 展 also provides the pronunciation

冥.hint: Depicts two hands (𠬜) opening a woman's legs with a baby's head protruding out of it. Based on the original meaning "to give birth to a child", now written as 娩. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

冬.hint: Depicts a rope with knots at both ends. Originally written as 𠂂. Based on the original meaning "tip, extremity", now written as 終. The meaning later shifted to "winter" (the final season of the year), in which the 冫 (ice) component was then added to reinforce the meaning.

凝.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 冫 represents the meaning and 疑 represents the sound.

凡.hint: Depicts a wide and flat object such as a tray or plate, now written as 槃. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

凤.hint: Simplified form of 鳳.  Phonosemantic compound. 鳥 represents the meaning and 凡 represents the sound. Originally a pictograph of a mythical Chinese bird, similar to a phoenix. Later the phonetic component 凡 was added.

农.hint: Simplified form of 農.  Depicts using a farming tool (辰) in a field (田).

冰.hint: Depicts chunks (冫) of frozen water (水).

况.hint: Simplified form of 況.  Phonosemantic compound. 冫 represents the meaning and 兄 represents the sound.

凉.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 冫 is a simplification of 氵 (water), based on the original meaning "light alcohol, dilute wine". 京 represents the sound. Simplified form of 涼.

冋.hint: A plot of land 口 surrounded by a border 冂; 冂 also provides the pronunciation

军.hint: Simplified form of 軍. Phonosemantic compound. 勻 represents the sound and 車 represents the meaning.

决.hint: Simplified form of 決.  Phonosemantic compound. 氵 represents the meaning and 夬 represents the sound. Based on the original meaning "burst open". The meaning later shifted to "clear", "cut off", "decide" and "judge".

冷.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 冫 represents the meaning and 令 represents the sound.

冻.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 冫 represents the meaning and 东 represents the sound. Simplified form of 凍.

其.hint: Pictograph of a basket, now written as 箕. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

冃.hint: Depicts a hat. Original form of 帽.

再.hint: Depicts catching two (二) fish at once, conveying the meaning "again". The fish component is similar to the bottom half of 冓.

冏.hint: Variant of 囧. Pictograph of a window.

凋.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 冫 represents the meaning and 周 represents the sound.

冔.gloss: cap worn during the Yin dynasty

冎.hint: Pictograph of bones. Original form of 骨 (bone).

凛.gloss: to shiver with cold or fear

凜.gloss: to shiver with cold or fear

冑.hint: A man ⺼ wearing a helmet 由

凄.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 冫 represents the meaning and 妻 represents the sound. Simplified form of 淒.

凍.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 冫 represents the meaning and 東 represents the sound.

冀.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 北 represents the meaning and 異 represents the sound.

冄.hint: 冄 is a variant form of 冉, which depicts two strands of hair drooping.

冈.hint: Simplified form of 岡.  Phonosemantic compound. 山 represents the meaning and 网 represents the sound.  The traditional component 山 was removed for simplification.

冊.hint: Pictograph of strips of bamboo strung together. In ancient China writing was done on bamboo strips.

冖.hint: Pictograph of a piece of cloth covering something.

冠.hint: Pictograph of a person (元) wearing a hat (冃). 元 also represents the sound. The 寸 (hand) component was added later to possibly indicate the hat is being held and put onto the head.

冽.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 冫 represents the meaning and 列 represents the sound.

刘.hint: Simplified form of 劉. Phonosemantic compound. 卯 represents the sound and 金 and 刂 represent the meaning. Based on the original meaning "battle-axe". The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

凵.hint: Pictograph of a cave or enclosure.

别.hint: Simplified form of 別.  Depicts a knife (刂) cutting meat off of a bone (另).

凯.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 岂 represents the meaning and 几 represents the sound. Simplified form of 凱.

划.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 戈 represents the sound. In simplified Chinese 划 is also used to mean "cut, delimit, draw", while in traditional Chinese this meaning is written with a separate character 劃.

判.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 半 represents the sound.

刊.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 干 represents the sound. Simplified form of 栞.

创.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 仓 represents the sound. Simplified form of 創. Based on the original meaning "wound, injury". The meaning "begin, establish" is a phonetic loan.

別.hint: Depicts a knife (刂) cutting meat off of a bone （冎）.

凭.hint: Leaning on (trusting) 任 a table 几

击.hint: Simplified form of 擊.  Based on the cursive form of the phonetic component 毄.

切.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刀 represents the meaning and 七 represents the sound.

初.hint: Depicts cutting out fabric (衤) with a knife (刀), the first step in making clothes.

删.hint: To cut 刂 out passages from a book 册

刪.hint: To cut 刂 out passages from a book 冊

凳.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 几 represents the meaning and 登 represents the sound. Simplified form of 櫈.

凶.hint: Pictograph of a trap in the ground.

则.hint: Simplified form of 則.  Depicts carving inscriptions on bronzeware (鼎) with a knife (刂). Based on the original meaning "law". In ancient China, some legal writings were inscribed on bronzeware.

凰.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 几 represents the meaning and 皇 represents the sound.

刎.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 勿 represents the sound.

刖.gloss: cutting off feet as form of punishment
刖.hint: Originally a pictograph of a saw cutting off a person's foot. Later the character was changed to a phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 月 represents the sound.

凹.hint: Pictograph of a concavity. Opposite of 凸.

刨.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 包 represents the sound. Simplified form of 鑤.

函.hint: Pictograph of an arrow inside a quiver. Based on the original meaning "quiver, arrow case". The meaning later shifted to "case", "box", "envelop" and "letter".

刑.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 井 represents the sound.

利.hint: Depicts harvesting grain (禾) with a blade (刂). Harvest was the main source of profit in agricultural societies.

凼.hint: Water 水 in a container 凵

凱.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 豈 represents the meaning and 几 represents the sound.

凿.hint: Simplified from 鑿. Depicts a chisel (丵) fashioning an object with an opening (凵).

刂.hint: 刂 is a component form of 刀, which depicts a knife.

分.hint: Depicts a knife (刀) being used to cut two things apart (八).

凸.hint: Pictograph of a bump sticking out. Opposite of 凹.

刍.hint: Simplified form of 芻. Pictograph of a hand picking off blades of grass.

列.hint: Depicts breaking apart bones (歹) using a knife (刂). 歹 also represents the sound. Based on the original meaning "break apart". The meaning later shifted to "arrange in order" and "list".

刚.hint: Simplified form of 剛.  Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 岡 represents the sound.

出.hint: Pictograph of a foot (止) exiting a cave (凵).

刃.hint: Pictograph of a knife. Similar to 刀 (knife), with an added dot marking where the blade is.

前.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 歬 represents the sound, and 刂 represents the meaning. Based on the original meaning "cut", now written as 剪. The current meaning "in front" is a phonetic loan.

刮.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 𠯑 represents the sound.

匁.gloss: Japanese unit of weight (1/1000 of a kan)

化.hint: Pictograph of a right-side up person (亻) and an upside-down person (𠤎), depicting the meaning "turn around" or "transform".

卄.hint: Two tens 十 side by side

卖.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 出 represents the meaning and 买 represents the sound. Simplified form of 賣.

劄.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 答 represents the meaning and 刂 represents the sound.

动.hint: Simplified form of 動.  Phonosemantic compound. 力 represents the meaning. The sound component 重 was simplified to 云.

助.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 力 represents the meaning and 且 represents the sound.

勋.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 力 represents the meaning and 员 represents the sound. Simplified form of 勛.

勤.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 力 represents the meaning and 堇 represents the sound. Simplified form of 懃.

匃.hint: Variant form of 丐. Depicts the blade of a knife. Similar in origin to 亡 and 方. Based on the original meaning "cut". The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

医.hint: Originally depicted a quiver, a container for arrows. Later repurposed to mean "medicine" as a simplified form of the traditional character 醫.

區.hint: Depicts a group of things (品) in an enclosed area.

午.hint: Pictograph of a pestle used for pounding rice, now written as 杵. The current meaning "noon" is a phonetic loan.

华.hint: Simplified form of 華.  化 is used here to represent the sound. The bottom component is a remnant from the traditional character 華.

单.hint: Simplified form of 單.  Pictograph of a hunting tool or weapon constructed from rocks tied to a tree branch. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

到.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 至 represents the meaning and 刂 represents the sound.

剃.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 弟 represents the sound. Simplified form of 薙.

劍.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 僉 represents the sound.

劦.hint: Triple of 力 (strength). Depicts uniting in common effort.

務.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 矛 represents the sound, while 攵 and 力 both represent the meaning.

勛.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 力 represents the meaning and 員 represents the sound.

匀.hint: Simplified form of 勻.  Phonosemantic compound. 云 represents the sound and 吕 represents the meaning.

协.hint: Simplified form of 協. Phonosemantic compound. 十 represents the sound and 劦 represents the meaning.

卒.hint: Depicts clothing (衣) with intersecting lines indicating that the clothing is done being sewed. Based on the original meaning, "to finish sewing clothes". The meaning later shifted to "to finish" and "to die" while its other meaning "soldier" is a phonetic loan.

剋.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 克 represents the sound and 刂 represents the meaning.

副.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 畐 represents the sound.

加.hint: Depicts making loud noises with the mouth (口) to add power (力) during manual labor.

努.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 力 represents the meaning and 奴 represents the sound.

勢.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 力 represents the meaning and 埶 represents the sound.

勸.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 力 represents the meaning and 雚 represents the sound.

十.hint: A single vertical line, representing one set of ten. Analagous to the archaic characters 廿 (twenty) and 卅 (thirty). Possibly originally a picture of a needle, now written as 針.

卓.hint: Pictograph of a person standing erect with something above the head, based on the original meaning "tall". The meaning later shifted to "outstanding" and "profound".

協.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 劦 represents the meaning and 十 represents the sound.

博.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 盾 represents the meaning and 尃 represents the sound. Based on the original meaning "fight", which later shifted to "win", "plentiful", and "gamble".

占.hint: In ancient China fortune-tellers analyzed cracks (卜) and holes (口) in shells and bones for the purpose of divination.

剽.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 票 represents the sound.

匆.hint: Variant form of 悤/囱, which depicts a line piercing an object. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

匕.hint: Depicts a spoon. 匕 as a component can be sometimes used to depict a person.

匱.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 匚 represents the meaning and 貴 represents the sound.

千.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 一 represents the meaning and 亻 represents the sound.

卑.hint: Pictograph of a hand holding a tool used by servants.

刻.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 亥 represents the sound.

剁.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 朵 represents the sound.

則.hint: Depicts carving inscriptions on bronzeware (鼎) with a knife (刂). Based on the original meaning "law". In ancient China, some legal writings were inscribed on bronzeware.

削.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 肖 represents the sound.

割.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 害 represents the sound.

劝.hint: The power 力 beside 又 the throne

劾.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 力 represents the meaning and 亥 represents the sound.

勘.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 力 represents the meaning and 甚 represents the sound.

勿.hint: Depicts a knife (刀) cutting with drops of blood coming out, based on the original meaning "cut throat", now written as 刎. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

匈.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 勹 represents the meaning and 凶 represents the sound.

剂.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 齐 represents the sound. Simplified form of 劑.

剑.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 佥 represents the sound. Simplified form of 劍.

剝.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 彔 represents the sound.

剧.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 居 represents the sound. Simplified form of 劇.

功.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 力 represents the meaning and 工 represents the sound.

劲.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 力 represents the meaning and 𢀖 represents the sound. Simplified form of 勁.

劳.hint: Simplified form of 勞.  Depicts the hard work of sewing clothes (衣) with only firelight (炏). Later the 力 (strength, power) component was added.

勁.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 力 represents the meaning and 巠 represents the sound.

勝.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 力 represents the meaning and 朕 represents the sound.

募.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 力 represents the meaning and 莫 represents the sound.

包.hint: Depicts a person (勹) hugging a child (子). Based on the original meaning "to embrace", now written as 抱. The meaning later shifted to "cover" and "wrap".

匙.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 匕 represents the meaning and 是 represents the sound.

卅.hint: Three vertical lines, representing three sets of ten (十).

刺.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 朿 represents the sound.

剔.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 易 represents the sound.

劇.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 豦 represents the sound.

务.hint: Simplified form of 務.  Phonosemantic compound. 矛 represents the sound, while 攵 and 力 both represent the meaning. The traditional component 矛 was removed for simplification.

勻.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 云 represents the sound and 吕 represents the meaning.

勾.hint: 勾 originated as a variant of 句. 口 represents the sound and 丩 represents the meaning and the sound.

匍.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 勹 represents the meaning and 甫 represents the sound.

匮.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 匚 represents the meaning and 贵 represents the sound. Simplified from 匱.

卣.hint: Pictograph of a type of wine vessel shaped like a gourd with a base on the bottom.

劣.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 少 represents the meaning and 力 represents the sound.

劫.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 力 represents the meaning and 去 represents the sound. Simplified form of 刦.

势.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 力 represents the meaning and 执 represents the sound. Simplified form of 勢.

区.hint: Simplified form of 區.  Depicts a group of things (品) in an enclosed area.

匾.hint: A board 扁 made of bamboo 匸; 扁 also provides the pronunciation

卟.hint: To speak 口 of the future 卜; 卜 also provides the pronunciation

卡.hint: Origin unclear, but typically explained as being stuck between something above (上) and something below (下). The uses of 卡 to mean "card" or "calorie" are foreign phonetic loans.

剮.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 咼 represents the sound.

劊.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 會 represents the sound.

劑.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 齊 represents the sound.

励.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 力 represents the meaning and 厉 represents the sound. Simplified form of 勵.

勃.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 孛 represents the sound and 力 represents the meaning.

動.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 力 represents the meaning and 重 represents the sound.

北.hint: Pictograph of two people standing back-to-back. Based on the original meaning "back", now written as 背. The current meaning "north" is a phonetic loan.

升.hint: Pictograph of a spoon with something inside it. Spoons are used to lift things up.

剛.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 岡 represents the sound.

勒.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 革 represents the meaning and 力 represents the sound.

勺.hint: Pictograph of a ladle with food in it.

匐.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 勹 represents the meaning and 畐 represents the sound.

刹.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 杀 represents the sound. Simplified form of 剎.

剌.hint: Depicts using a knife (刂) to cut crops (𣏮). Similar in origin to 利.

剥.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 录 represents the sound. Simplified form of 剝.

勞.hint: Depicts the hard work of sewing clothes (衣) with only firelight (炏). Later the 力 (strength, power) component was added.

勹.hint: Pictograph of the side view of a person bending over. Original form of 伏.

匹.hint: Origin unclear. Possibly depicts a folded piece of cloth.

制.hint: Depicts cutting down a tree (未) with a knife (刂). Based on the original meaning "break". The meaning later shifted to "control".

刷.hint: Depicts a person squatting (尸) and holding a utensil (刂 ) attached to a cloth (巾) to scrub or clean something.

刽.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 会 represents the sound. Simplified form of 劊.

創.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 倉 represents the sound.  Based on the original meaning "wound, injury". The meaning "begin, establish" is a phonetic loan.

劈.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刀 represents the meaning and 辟 represents the sound.

勇.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 力 represents the meaning and 甬 represents the sound.

勵.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 力 represents the meaning and 厲 represents the sound.

匯.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 匚 represents the meaning and 淮 represents the sound.

卂.hint: Depicts a captive prisoner with their hands tied behind their back. Based on the original meaning "captured prisoner of war". The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

半.hint: Depicts separating a cow (牛) into two halves (八).

卜.hint: Pictograph of a crack on a bone. In ancient China such cracks were used for fortune-telling.

剳.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 荅 represents the meaning and 刂 represents the sound.

劓.hint: To cut 刂 the nose 鼻; 鼻 also provides the pronunciation

勉.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 力 represents the meaning and 免 represents the sound.

匊.hint: A handful of rice 米 in a bowl 勹

匋.hint: Depicts a person bent over (勹) making a clay pot (缶). 勹 also represents the sound. Original form of 陶.

剖.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 咅 represents the sound.

力.hint: Pictograph of a plow, which requires strength to operate.

卌.hint: Four vertical lines, representing four sets of ten (十).

南.hint: Depicts a bell-shaped musical instrument. The current meaning of 南 is a phonetic loan.

卢.hint: Simplified form of 盧.  Originally a pictograph of a stove, based on the original meaning "stove", now written as 爐. The 虍 and 皿 components were added later. In modern Mandarin this character is usually only used for its sound in foreign loan words.

卤.hint: Simplified form of 鹵.  Depicts a container used for for salt extraction.

剩.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 乘 represents the sound.

剪.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刀 represents the meaning and 前 represents the sound.

劃.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 刂 represents the meaning and 畫 represents the sound.

劉.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 卯 represents the sound and 金 and 刂 represent the meaning. Based on the original meaning "battle-axe". The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

办.hint: Simplified form of 辦.  Phonosemantic compound. 力 represents the meaning and 辡 represents the sound.

卉.hint: Depicts a group of plants (屮, 艹). Originally written as 芔 (屮, 艸) resulting in its erroneous replacement of the once visually similar but unrelated form of 犇 (run) within some characters.

厄.hint: Pictograph of a yoke or harness attached to a work animal, such as a horse or ox.

即.hint: Depicts a kneeling person (卩) eating from a container of food (皀). Based on the original meaning "eat". The meaning later shifted to "come near", "approach", and "quickly".

卵.hint: Pictograph of the scrotum of a male's penis. The meaning later shifted to "egg", "ovum", and "spawn".

厉.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 厂 represents the meaning and 万 represents the sound. Simplified form of 厲.

厚.hint: Depicts a jug of wine (𣆪) that has been aging in a cave (厂), thus having a strong flavor.

厮.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 厂 represents the meaning and 斯 represents the sound. Simplified form of 廝.

厶.hint: A small circle depicting personal space or things revolving around oneself. Original form of 私.

取.hint: Pictograph of a hand (又) grabbing an ear (耳). In ancient China, the ears of opponents in battle were cut off and collected as tokens of victory.

叫.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 丩 represents the sound.

吧.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 巴 represents the sound.

吭.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 亢 represents the sound.

厂.hint: Pictograph of a cliff or similarly shaped object. Sometimes used interchangeably with 广 to depict a roof. In simplified Chinese 厂 is also used to mean "factory", while in traditional Chinese this meaning is written with a separate character 廠.

叀.hint: Pictograph of a spinning wheel or spindle.

参.hint: Simplified form of 參.  Depicts three (三) stars (晶) shining (光). Originally represented the Three Stars constellation (參) in Chinese astronomy. The more common meaning "take part in" is a phonetic loan.

友.hint: Pictograph of two hands together to convey the meaning "friend". 又 also represents the sound.

叐.gloss: to prick a dog to make him go

句.hint: 口 represents the sound and 丩 represents the meaning and the sound.

右.hint: Pictograph of a right hand. The 口 (mouth) component was added later to distinguish the character from 又.

吃.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 乞 represents the sound.

吗.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 马 represents the sound.

听.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 厅 represents the sound. Simplified form of 聽.  Before 听 was used as a simplified character, it was pronounced yǐn and was an archaic word for "smile".

卬.hint: Depicts a person kneeling (卩) looking up to a person standing (人).

卫.hint: Simplified from 衛. Phonosemantic compound. 行 represents the meaning and 韋 represents the sound. The 行 component was deleted for simplification.

卻.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 卩 represents the meaning and 谷 represents the sound.

叕.hint: Depicts a person with their hands and feet tied up, conveying the meaning "to join together". Original form of 綴. Not related to 又 (hand), despite the visual similarity.

合.hint: Depicts two mouths talking to each other.

吞.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 天 represents the sound.

吻.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 勿 represents the sound. Simplified form of 脗.

厘.hint: Simplified form of 釐. Phonosemantic compound. 𠩺 represents the meaning and 里 represents the sound.

厨.hint: Simplified form of 廚.  Phonosemantic compound. 广 represents the meaning and 尌 represents the sound.

叒.hint: Three hands 又 joined, representing unity

叠.hint: Clothes 叒 stacked on top of a drawer 冝

叩.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 卩 represents the meaning and 口 represents the sound. Simplified form of 敂.

召.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 刀 represents the sound.

叶.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 十 represents the sound. Originally a variant of 協 (cooperate). Later used as the simplified form of the phonetically similar character 葉 (leaf).

叹.hint: Simplified form of 嘆. Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 𦰩 represents the sound.

吾.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 五 represents the sound.

卧.hint: Depicts a person (人) with their eye (臣) leaning forward preparing to lie down and sleep.

及.hint: Pictograph of a hand (又) reaching to grab a person (人).

叛.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 反 represents the meaning and 半 represents the sound.

吅.hint: Duplicate of 口 (mouth). Depicts multiple mouths making lots of noise.

吆.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 幺 represents the sound.

吋.hint: A foreign 口 inch 寸; 寸 also provides the pronunciation

吖.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 丫 represents the sound.

只.hint: Origin unclear. In simplified Chinese, in addition to the meaning "only", 只 is also used as a measure word. In traditional Chinese this meaning is written as 隻.

叭.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 八 represents the sound.

叮.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 丁 represents the sound.

叱.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 七 represents the sound.

吲.hint: To stretch 引 the mouth 口; 引 also provides the pronunciation

吳.hint: Pictograph of a person (大) standing up, yelling with an open mouth (口).

吶.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 內 represents the sound.

吹.hint: Depicts blowing out air (欠) with the mouth (口).

卦.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 卜 represents the meaning and 圭 represents the sound.

厕.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 厂 represents the meaning and 则 represents the sound. Simplified form of 廁.

厢.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 厂 represents the meaning and 相 represents the sound. Simplified form of 廂.

厦.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 厂 represents the meaning and 夏 represents the sound. Simplified form of 廈.

受.hint: Depicts a boat (舟) being passed from one hand (爫) to another hand (又). 舟 also served as phonetic, but it was later abbreviated.

号.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 丂 represents the sound. Simplified form of 號.

吊.hint: Variant of 弔. Depicts a person carrying silk streamers used for wrapping around arrows with. Based on the original meaning "silk streamers used for arrows", now written as 繳. The meaning later shifted to "to hang" and "to hang a person".

历.hint: Simplified form of 歷. Phonosemantic compound.  厤 represents the meaning and 力 represents the sound.

厝.hint: A building 厂 containing the past 昔

原.hint: Depicts water coming from a spring (泉) on a cliff (厂).

又.hint: Pictograph of a hand. The character is based on the original meaning "hand". The current meaning "again" is a phonetic loan.

后.hint: Depicts a queen mother (母) giving birth to her heir (𠫓). Based on the original meaning "heir to the throne". The meaning later expanded to "ruler", "successor", and "after".

向.hint: Depicts a mouth (口) in a closed space (宀) making an echo sound. Based on the original meaning "echo; sound", now written as 響. The meaning later shifted to "direction" and "toward".

吟.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 今 represents the sound.

叁.hint: Three 三 with accents to prevent forgery

叔.hint: Depicts holding a sharp wooden stick (弋) in the hand (又) to dig up dirt. Based on the original meaning "to dig". The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

古.hint: Depicts a shield. Based on the original meaning "firm, solid", which is now written as 固. The current meaning "old" is a phonetic loan.

君.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 尹 represents the sound.

厃.hint: Depicts a person (人) standing on a cliff (厂).

厅.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 广 represents the meaning and 丁 represents the sound. Simplified form of 廳.

厗.hint: A bitter 辛 mineral 厂

厭.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 厂 represents the meaning and 猒 represents the sound. Original form of 壓 (press, push down), related to packed-earth construction of buildings (厂).

叚.hint: Depicts a hand (又) sharpening a knife (刀) on a stone (石). Based on the original meaning "whetstone", now written as 碬. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

可.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and the right component, which is a pictograph of an axe handle (now written as 柯), represents the sound. Based on the original meaning "sing", now written as 歌. The current meaning "able to" is a phonetic loan.

吁.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 于 represents the sound. Simplified form of 籲.

同.hint: Depicts a large object (凡) like a shoulder carriage that requires the cooperation of multiple people working together to carry.

名.hint: Depicts a mouth (口) saying their own name at night (夕) when it is too dark for others to see them.

卯.hint: Depicts two knives side-by-side. Based on the original meaning "butcher's knife". The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

危.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 卩 represents the meaning and 厃 represents the sound.

卷.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 龹 represents the sound and 卩 represents the meaning.

厌.hint: Simplified form of 厭.  Phonosemantic compound. 厂 represents the meaning and 猒 represents the sound.

县.hint: Simplified form of 縣.  Pictograph of a severed head (首) hanging on a rope (系) from a tree (木). Based on the original meaning "hang" or "suspend". The current meaning is a phonetic loan. The traditional component 系 was removed for simplification.

叉.hint: Depicts an object being held between fingers in the hand (又).

叟.hint: Depicts a hand (又) holding a torch (火) in a dark room (宀) looking for something. Based on the original meaning "search for", now written as 搜. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

司.hint: Depicts using a scepter and a mouth (口) to command or take control of something.

各.hint: Depicts a foot (夂) arriving at an entrance (口). Based on the original meaning "arrive". The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

吉.hint: Depicts a hook-shaped weapon made out of copper. Based on the original meaning "solid, difficult to break". The meaning later shifted to "good" and "lucky".

含.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 今 represents the sound.

压.hint: Simplified form of 壓.  Phonosemantic compound. 土 represents the meaning and 厌 represents the sound.

反.hint: Pictograph of a hand (又) climbing a cliff (厂). Based on original meaning "climb", now written as 扳. The meaning later shifted to "pull" and "reverse".

吠.hint: The sound a dog 犬 makes with their mouth 口

厤.hint: Origin unclear. 秝 is a sound component.

參.hint: Depicts three (三) stars (晶) shining (光). Originally represented the Three Stars constellation (參) in Chinese astronomy. The more common meaning "take part in" is a phonetic loan.

发.hint: Simplified form of both 發 (send out) and 髮 (hair). Visually similar to 犮, the bottom component of 髮.

叙.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 又 represents the meaning and 余 represents the sound. Simplified form of 敘.

台.hint: Originally 台 and 㠯 were pronounced the same and thus written the same. Later 口 was added to distinguish the characters.

叽.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 几 represents the sound. Simplified form of 嘰.

吩.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 分 represents the sound.

吴.hint: Simplified form of 吳.  Pictograph of a person (天) standing up, yelling with an open mouth (口).

吵.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 少 represents the sound.

印.hint: Pictograph of a kneeling person (卩) being held down by a hand (爪). Based on the original meaning "restrain", now written as 抑. The meaning later shifted to "push down", "stamp", and "print".

却.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 卩 represents the meaning and 去 represents the sound. Simplified form of 卻.

厩.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 厂 represents the meaning and 既 represents the sound. Simplified form of 廄.

叧.gloss: to cut meat off away from bones

吮.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 允 represents the sound.

厓.hint: A cliff 厂 formed of earth 土

厷.hint: Depicts a hand (𠂇) with a circular mark on the arm to indicate the forearm. Original form of 肱.

去.hint: Depicts opening the mouth (口) wide (大) to let a yawn leave the mouth. Original form of 呿.

双.hint: Simplified form of 雙.  Depicts a pair of hands.

另.hint: Variant of 冎. Pictograph of bones. Based on the original meaning "bones". The meaning later shifted to "separate", "other" and "another".

史.hint: The characters 史 (history), 吏 (government official), 使 (cause; use; instruct), and 事 (matter; work; affair) are all etymologically related and all derive from the same ancient character, depicting a hand (又) holding a container for writing utensils.

吐.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 土 represents the sound.

吡.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 比 represents the sound.

吨.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 屯 represents the sound. Simplified form of 噸.

厲.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 厂 represents the meaning and 萬 represents the sound.

变.hint: Simplified form of 變.  Phonosemantic compound. 夂 represents the meaning and 䜌 represents the sound.

叨.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 刀 represents the sound.

吏.hint:
The characters 史 (history), 吏 (government official), 使 (cause; use; instruct), and 事 (matter; work; affair) are all etymologically related and all derive from the same ancient character, depicting a hand (又) holding a container for writing utensils. 
吏 and 史 were originally written the same, but later an extra mark was added to distinguish them.

吓.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 下 represents the sound. Simplified form of 嚇.

否.hint: Originally the same character as 不. Distinguishing component 口 was added later to the character when it took on the meaning "not". 不 represents the sound.

启.hint: Simplified form of 啟. Depicts a hand (又) opening a door (户) of an opening (口). The 又 (hand) component was later removed for simplification.

吱.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 支 represents the sound.

吸.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 及 represents the sound.

䰎.gloss: to twist the hair in a knot on the top of the head

䰼.gloss: a condiment made from minced fish salted

䰏.gloss: sparse hair on a knot on the top of the head

䰀.gloss: dressed hair of a Chinese woman

䰉.gloss: dressed hair in a horizontal way

䰑.gloss: (non-classical form of 䰅) (same as 須 鬚) beard

䰙.gloss: an ancient unit of capacity with three feet and a big opening

䰚.gloss: the top part of the rice gruel

䰜.hint: Depicts a vessel (鬲) with hot steam rising around it.

䰹.gloss: (non-classical and abbreviated form of 鱡) (same as 鰂) the cuttlefish

䰔.gloss: (non-classical of 䰉) dressed hair in a horizontal way

䰰.gloss: (same as 䰭) dreary cries of ghosts

䰘.gloss: to kill by hanging or to strangulation

䰸.gloss: (interchangeable 魟 same as 鰩) the nautilus

䰝.gloss: a large earthen pot for cooking

䰍.gloss: (same as U+9AE4 髹) a kind of dark-red paint

䰛.gloss: (same as 鬲) a large earthen pot

䰭.gloss: (same as 䰰) dreary cries of ghosts

䰌.gloss: to bind the hair in a knot on the top of the head

䰿.gloss: (non-classical of 鮀) a kind of small fish grown in fresh water

丮.hint: Pictograph of a person with both hands outstretched.

丱.gloss: child's hairstyle bound in two tufts
丱.hint: Pictograph of a child's hairstyle with two tufts.

乞.hint: Originally a variant of 气, which depicts a gust of air. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

买.hint: Pictograph of money (貝) coming out of a netted bag (网). The simplified character 买 was adapted from the cursive form of the traditional character 買.

䱳.gloss: (same as 鱣) a kind of sturgeon

䳆.gloss: a kind of species of myna (or mynah)

䴍.gloss: a kind of strange and weird bird

䶅.gloss: a marmot-like rat with a big head

䶜.gloss: the process to whiten the ivory or elephant tusk

䶦.gloss: upper and lower teeth in order and corresponding each other

並.hint: Depicts two people standing (立) side by side.

个.hint: Pictograph of one stalk of bamboo. Same as one half of the character for bamboo (竹).

丵.hint: Depicts a chisel-shaped tool or weapon. Related to 鑿 (chisel). Used in 對 to depict a tool to develop land, in 業 as a weapon to conquer territory, and in 菐 as an implement to pound something with.

义.hint: Adapted from the cursive form of the traditional character 義. Phonosemantic compound. 羊 represents the meaning and 我 represents the sound. In ancient China sheep (羊) were associated with goodness and beauty, which is why 羊 is a component in characters like 美 (beautiful), 善 (benevolent), and 義 (justice).

乱.hint: Simplified form of 亂.  Depicts two hands (爪, 又) organizing tangled threads.

䱷.gloss: (same as 魚 漁) to fish

䲃.gloss: a carp-like fish with chicken feet

䳰.gloss: (same as 鴇) a bird resembling the wild goose

䴓.gloss: general term for a group of small birds

三.hint: Three horizontal strokes, representing the number three.

丐.hint: Depicts the blade of a knife. Similar in origin to 亡 and 方. Based on the original meaning "cut". The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

丣.gloss: ancient form of the tenth of the twelve Terrestrial Branches

乎.hint: Depicts wind rustling through a tree branch (丂). Based on the original meaning "exhale, shout", now written as 呼. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

䱧.gloss: (record in an antique books) a kind of fish (same as 鱔) eels

䲍.gloss: (standard form of 鰧) a perch-like fish with white body and red tail

䲱.gloss: (same as 鶭) a kind of black bird

䳜.gloss: (same as 鵌) a kind of bird which shares its nest with rats

䳽.gloss: (non-classical form of 鸖) (same as 鶴) crane

䴶.gloss: (same as 麷) to boil or stew wheat

䵡.gloss: (non-classical form of U+4D64 䵤) to crack or chap

䵺.gloss: (same as 圢 町) boundary between agricultural lands

上.hint: Originally a small line or dot above a longer line, indicating "up". The vertical line was added to distinguish the character from 二 (two). Opposite of 下.

不.hint: Pictograph of sepals of a flower. The modern meaning "no" is a phonetic loan.

丑.hint: Depicts of a hand or paw with fingernails or claws. The current meaning is a phonetic loan. In simplified Chinese 丑 is also used to mean "ugly", while in traditional Chinese this meaning is written with a separate character 醜.

串.hint: Pictograph of two objects on a skewer or strung together.

乤.gloss: first character of Korean place name 'Halpho'

䱗.gloss: a long narrow fish Trichiurus armatus

䱄.gloss: (non-classical and corrupted form of 魪) a flatfish

䳡.gloss: (same as 鵻) a kind of bird in ancient books

䳮.gloss: to look at in surprise (said of bird)

且.hint: Originally a pictograph of a sacrificial altar. The current meaning "moreover" is a phonetic loan.

久.hint: Depicts an arrow nock. The nock is the part of an arrow that is held against the bowstring before being launched. Same origin as 氒. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

乘.hint: Depicts a person (人) who has climbed up a tree (木).

䳶.gloss: (same as 㶉) a kind of water bird

䵞.gloss: (ancient form of 黥) ancient punishment of tattooing the face

䵫.gloss: (same as 纁) light red (same as 黦) yellowish black

䶬.gloss: hard fins on the back of a dragon

七.hint: Depicts two lines crossing. Based on the original meaning "cut", now written as 切. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

丛.hint: Simplified form of 叢. 从 represents the sound.

两.hint: Simplified form of 兩.  Combination of two 丙 characters. 丙 also represents the sound.

中.hint: Depicts a flagpole. There is a circle in the middle marking the center of the flagpole. In older forms of the character, the flagpole  has streamers at the top and bottom used to show the direction of the wind.

䱉.gloss: (corrupted form of 䱇) (same as 鱓

䱫.gloss: (same as 鯻) a kind of fish

䳄.gloss: (same as 鴜) a kind of water bird

䳪.gloss: (non-classical form of 鷒) a kind of bird

䴷.gloss: use the whole piece of barley to ferment for brewing

䵦.gloss: (non-classical form of 汙 污) to stain

与.hint: Simplified form of 與.  Phonosemantic compound. 舁 represents the meaning and 牙 represents the sound.  The traditional component 舁 was removed for simplification.

东.hint: Pictograph of a basket or a bag. The current meaning "east" is a phonetic loan. The simplified character 东 was adapted from the cursive form of the traditional character 東.

举.hint: Simplified form of 舉.  Phonosemantic compound. 手 represents the meaning and 與 represents the sound.

䶘.gloss: the sound of chewing something dry and hard

丟.hint: A horizontal line, depicting an item being discarded, added to the semantically similar character 去 (leave; go).

严.hint: Simplified form of 嚴.  Phonosemantic compound. 喦 represents the meaning and 敢 represents the sound. Based on the original meaning "exaggerate". The meaning later shifted to "extreme", "severe", and "strict". The traditional component 敢 was removed for simplification.

乄.gloss: SHIME: to find a place to dwell

之.hint: Pictograph of a foot (止) going out of an area. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

乐.hint: Pictograph of an ancient wooden stringed musical instrument. The simplified character 乐 was adapted from the cursive form of the traditional character 樂.

乓.hint: Derived from 兵 (bīng), with one stroke removed. Symmetric with 乒, so that 乒乓 (pīngpāng) resembles the back-and-forth motion of ping-pong.

九.hint: Depicts an elbow. Based on the original meaning "elbow", now written as 肘. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

乡.hint: Simplified form of 鄉.  Pictograph of two people facing each other, kneeling down to share a meal. Based on the original meaning "feast" or "offer food", now written as 饗. The meaning later shifted to "hometown". The right two components were removed for simplification.

䱁.gloss: a kind of medium sized fish grown in the sea

䲄.gloss: (same as 鮸) an ocean fish with long flat body

䲴.gloss: (same as 鴆) a kind of venomous bird

䳚.gloss: a sort of nightingale which is said to sing for the dawn

一.hint: A single horizontal stroke, representing the number one.

丩.hint: Pictograph of two ropes entangled together, now written as 糾.

䱟.gloss: (an ancient name) a kind of silver fish

䳈.gloss: (same as 鴇) a bird resembling the wild goose

䵆.gloss: (same as 䴿) grains from the distillery

丁.hint: In ancient scripts 丁 was written in two different ways: (1) depicting the walls of a city, which is now written as 圍, or (2) depicting a nail, which is now written as 釘.

丄.hint: Variant of 上. Originally a small line or dot above a longer line, indicating "up". The vertical line was added to distinguish the character from 二 (two). Opposite of 下.

业.hint: Simplified character from the top 5 strokes of the traditional 業. Depicts a person (大) carrying a weapon (丵). Based on the original meaning "attack". The meaning later shifted to "expand territory" and "develop business".

丞.hint: Depicts using two hands (廾) to rescue a person (卩) trapped in a pit (凵). Original form of 拯. The modern meaning "deputy" is a phonetic loan.

丢.hint: A horizontal line, depicting an item being discarded, added to the semantically similar character 去 (leave; go).

乒.hint: Derived from 兵 (bīng), with one stroke removed. Symmetric with 乓, so that 乒乓 (pīngpāng) resembles the back-and-forth motion of ping-pong.

䱨.gloss: (same as 䱥) a kind of fish

䲁.gloss: general term of a kind of fish

䲢.gloss: (simplified form of 鰧) a kind of fish

䴈.gloss: (non-classical form) a kind of water bird

世.hint: Depicts three leaves on branches of a tree. Remnant from the top part of 枼. Based on the original meaning "leaf", now written as 葉. The meaning later shifted to "generation", since leaves pile up in hundreds much like a generation.

丙.hint: Depicts a platform to put things on. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

丬.hint: 丬 is a component form of 爿.

丸.hint: Derived from 夗. Pictograph of a dying animal lying down. The meaning later shifted to "small round object", "pellet" and "pill".

丹.hint: Depicts a chunk of cinnabar found in a well for mining.

主.hint: Pictograph of a memorial tablet used for spiritual rituals, similar to 示.

丿.hint: Line curving downwards to the left.

乃.hint: Possibly depicts a woman standing sideways with her breasts protruding. Based on the original meaning "breast", now written as 奶. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

䱰.gloss: (same as 鮦 鯉 鱧) a kind of fish

䲰.gloss: a name for the pigeon or the turtle dove

䳅.gloss: a kind of bird which shares its nest with rats

䴤.gloss: an animal as big as a rabbit

䴽.gloss: a small round piece of distiller's grains or yeast

䶊.gloss: (corrupted form) (interchangeable with 衄) to bleed at the nose

䶙.gloss: swelling of the gums (of the teeth)

万.hint: Variant of 丏. Depicts a person (人) with a cover on top, conveying the original meaning "to not be seen". The current meaning is a phonetic loan. Simplified form of 萬.

为.hint: Simplified form of 為.  Pictograph of a hand (又) guiding an elephant (象) to do work (in ancient China elephants were tamed to do work). Based on the meaning "to work; to do".

乌.hint: Simplified form of 烏.  Pictograph of a crow. Similar to 鳥.

䱅.gloss: (same as 鱴 鮆) the mullet

䱔.gloss: (same as 鰷) a long narrow and silver colored fish

䱙.gloss: (same as 鮛) a small kind of tuna or sturgeon

䲟.gloss: (simplified form of 鮣) a kind of fish

䳋.gloss: a pheasant-like bird with black and body and red feet

䳛.gloss: (same as 鷃) a small brown speckled bird like the quail

䳬.gloss: (same as 鷊) a kind of bird

䳵.gloss: a kind of water bird with colorful feather

䵹.gloss: (standard form 鼅) insects that are injurious to crops

䵻.gloss: a small tripod of bronze with two ears (standard form 鏏) tripod of bronze with two ears

乇.hint: Origin unclear. Traditionally explained as a pictograph of a blade of grass.

么.hint: Variant form of 幺, which is a pictograph of a twisted thread.

乍.hint: Pictograph of a blade for cutting trees. Original form of 柞. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

习.hint: Simplified form of 習.  Phonosemantic compound. 彗 represents the sound and 日 represents the meaning. Based on the original meaning "to scorch". The current meaning is a phonetic loan. The traditional component 日 was removed for simplification.

䱹.gloss: (standard form) (same as 鮓) a condiment made from minced fish salted

䲠.gloss: (simplified form 鰆) a kind of fish

䳊.gloss: (same as 䳁) a wild duck-like water bird

䴉.gloss: general term for a group of bird (looks like egret)

䴢.gloss: (same as 麋) a kind of deer

䵄.gloss: (same as 麷) to boil or stew wheat

䵅.gloss: (same as 熬) to extract by applying heat

䵬.gloss: black (corrupted form of 濌) sound of the flowing water

䵸.gloss: (same as 鼀) the toad that lives in the moon

䶖.gloss: disease of tongue (said of an ox)

䶵.gloss: (same as U+7B8E 箎) a bamboo flute with seven holes

丝.hint: Simplified form of 絲.  Duplication of 纟 (silk).

丧.hint: Simplified form of 喪. Depicts multiple mouths (吅) wailing to mourn the death (亡) of someone. 桑 and 亡 represent the sound.

丰.hint: Depicts a growing plant with leaves.

丷.gloss: “ears-out” component used in some Chinese characters (e.g. U+5151 兑)

䲣.gloss: (same as 魚 漁) to fish

䲯.gloss: a kind of black small bird

䴙.gloss: a kind of bird resembling the duck

䶌.gloss: (same as 皰) a pustule or pimple

䶛.gloss: to separate the meat from the bones with teeth

丈.hint: Depicts 10 (十) hand-lengths (又): 丈 (~3 meters) is a traditional Chinese unit of length equal to 10 尺 (~0.3 meters). The current use of 丈 as "husband" is a phonetic loan.

丏.hint: Depicts a person (人) with a cover on top, conveying the original meaning "to not be seen". The meaning later shifted to "invisible" and "parapet".

专.hint: Depicts a hand (寸) spinning a wheel (叀). Based on the original meaning "turn", now written as 轉. The current meaning is a phonetic loan. The simplified character 专 was adapted from the cursive form of the traditional character 專.

丽.hint: Simplified form of 麗.  Pictograph of a deer (鹿) with two beautiful antlers. The traditional component 鹿 was removed for simplification.

乏.hint: Derived from 正, but with the line on top slanted to indicate "crooked (i.e. not straight)". The meaning later shifted to "lack".

乑.hint: Depicts three people standing side-by-side. Ancient variant of 眾.

书.hint: Simplified form of 書.  Phonosemantic compound. 聿 represents the meaning and 者 represents the sound. The simplified character 书 is derived from the cursive form of 書.

䲵.gloss: (same as 雀) a general name of small birds

䶨.gloss: in the manner a toothless person chewing food

下.hint: Originally a small line or dot below a longer line, indicating "down". The vertical line was added to distinguish the character from 二 (two). Opposite of 上.

临.hint: Simplified form of 臨.  Depicts a person (人) looking (臣) down at a pile of objects (品). 品 also represents the sound. Based on the original meaning, "to look down". The meaning has shifted over time and now means "draw near".

乂.hint: Pictograph of a shears-like tool for cutting grass.

乔.hint: Simplified form of 喬.  Originally written the same as 高 (tall). The top part of the character was altered to distinguish 喬 from 高.

也.hint: Depicts a child opening its mouth to cry. Original form of 嗁. The modern meaning is a phonetic loan.

人.hint: Pictograph of the side view of a standing person.

仆.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 卜 represents the sound. Simplified form of 僕.

仔.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 子 represents the sound.

伎.hint: A man 亻 who can support 支 someone

佑.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 右 represents the sound.

二.hint: Two horizontal strokes, representing the number two.

亖.hint: Four horizontal strokes, representing the number four.

亢.hint: Pictograph of a person with a line through their legs. Original meaning unclear.

亵.hint: Hands grasping 执 and tearing apart a dress 衣

从.hint: Pictograph of one person following another.

仾.gloss: to hang or bow the head

伍.hint: Five 五 people 亻; 五 also provides the pronunciation

众.hint: Triple of 人 (person), depicts many people together. Simplified form of 眾.

伽.gloss: transcription of sanskrit 'gha' in buddhist texts ('samgha'
伽.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 加 represents the sound.

何.hint: Depiction of a man carrying an axe on over his shoulders. The right side of the form was later phoneticized into 可. The current meaning "what" is a phonetic loan.

京.hint: Pictograph of a tall building. Similar to 高. Based on the original meaning "high place". The meaning of this character has shifted over time and now means "capital city".

亲.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 木 represents the meaning and 辛 represents the sound. Based on the original meaning "chestnut". This character was repurposed during character simplification as the simplified form of 親.

仑.hint: Simplified form of 侖.  Depicts an assembly (亼) of writings (冊).

伏.hint: Depicts a person (亻) lying down next to a dog (犬). The meaning later shifted to "crouch".

伧.hint: A person 亻 from the farm 仓; 仓 also provides the pronunciation

佔.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 占 represents the sound.

仃.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 丁 represents the sound.

仅.hint: Simplified from 僅. Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 堇 represents the sound.

件.hint: Depicts a person (亻) cutting a cow (牛) into pieces.

佩.hint: Common 凡 cloth 巾 ornaments worn by people 亻

交.hint: Pictograph of a person standing with crossed legs, conveying the meaning "to cross".

付.hint: Depicts a hand (寸) giving payment to a person (亻).

份.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 分 represents the sound.

传.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 专 represents the sound. Simplified form of 傳.

伴.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 半 represents the sound.

伾.hint: A great 丕 man 亻; 丕 also provides the pronunciation

低.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 氐 represents the sound.

佬.hint: An old 老 person 亻; 老 also provides the pronunciation

争.hint: Simplified form of 爭.  Depicts two hands (爫 又) grabbing the same plow.

亚.hint: Simplified form of 亞.  Depicts a wooden structure where coffins are placed. Based on the original meaning "tomb". The current meaning "Asia" is a phonetic loan.

亟.hint: Originally a pictograph of a person with lines at the top and bottom, depicting the original meaning "extremity". Later the 口 (mouth) and 又 (hand) components were added to depict shouting in an urgent situation, such as being chased.

亥.hint: Depicts roots of a plant. Based on the original meaning "roots", now written as 荄. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

亻.hint: 亻 is a component form of 人, which depicts a person.

仍.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 乃 represents the sound.

位.hint: Depicts a person (亻) standing (立) in a specific position.

余.hint: Pictograph of a small shelter. Based on the original meaning "residence", now written as 舍. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

乾.hint: 倝 is used to represent the sound. 乙 is a distinguishing stroke.

享.hint: Originally a pictograph of a temple or a shrine. The meaning later shifted to "food offering" and "enjoy".

仇.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 九 represents the sound.

伤.hint: Simplified form of 傷.  Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 昜 represents the sound.

亏.hint: Originally the same character as 于, depicting a musical wind instrument with a reed, which is now written as 竽. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

井.hint: Pictograph of the opening of a water well.

亭.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 京 represents the meaning and 丁 represents the sound.

亯.hint: Variant of 享. Originally a pictograph of a temple or a shrine. The meaning later shifted to "food offering" and "enjoy".

仁.hint: Depicts a kind relationship between two (二) people (亻). 亻 also represents the sound.

仗.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 丈 represents the sound.

仝.hint: Variant of 同. Phonosemantic compound. 人 represents the meaning and 工 represents the sound.

代.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 弋 represents the sound.

企.gloss: plan a project, stand on tiptoe
企.hint: Depicts a person (人) standing on their feet (止).

伊.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 尹 represents the sound.

伟.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 韦 represents the sound. Simplified form of 偉.

伺.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 司 represents the sound.

乳.hint: Depicts a mother holding (爫) a child (子) breastfeeding it.

事.hint:
The characters 史 (history), 吏 (government official), 使 (cause; use; instruct), and 事 (matter; work; affair) are all etymologically related and all derive from the same ancient character, depicting a hand (又) holding a container for writing utensils.
事 and 史 were originally written the same, but later an extra mark was added to distinguish them.

亙.hint: Depicts the moon (月) between the earth and the sky。

产.hint: Simplified form of 產.  Phonosemantic compound. 生 represents the meaning and 彥 represents the sound. The traditional component 生 was removed for simplification.

仄.hint: 厂 represents a slanted cliff and 夨 represents a person with a tilted head, thus conveying the meaning "slanting".

介.hint: Depicts a person between two lines.

仲.hint: The middle 中 person 亻; 中 also provides the pronunciation

任.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 壬 represents the sound.

会.hint: Simplified form of 會.  Phonosemantic compound. 合 represents the meaning and 𡆧 represents the sound.

亂.hint: Depicts two hands (爫, 又) organizing tangled threads.

亶.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 㐭 represents the meaning and 旦 represents the sound.

仟.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 千 represents the sound.

优.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 尤 represents the sound. Simplified form of 優.

佈.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻represents the meaning and 布 represents the sound.

体.hint: Simplified form of 體. The foundation (本) of a person (亻) is their body (体).

佗.hint: Another 它 person 亻; see 他 and 她 for modern variants

佚.hint: To lose 失 a person 亻

佛.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 弗 represents the sound.

佥.hint: Simplified form of 僉.  Depicts multiple people (人) opening their mouths (口) to speak together, representing the meaning "together" or "all".

云.hint: Depicts a swirl of clouds up (上) in the sky.

仕.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 士 represents the sound.

令.hint: Depicts a person (卩) receiving commands from a mouth (口) above them.

伕.hint: A working 夫 man 亻; 夫 also provides the pronunciation

伙.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 火 represents the sound. Simplified form of 夥.

伞.hint: Simplified form of 傘.  Pictograph of an umbrella.

佃.hint: A person 亻 on the farm 田; 田 also provides the pronunciation

住.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 主 represents the sound.

佣.hint: An employed 用 person 亻; 用 also provides the pronunciation

予.hint: Embellishment of the phonetically similar character 呂.

于.hint: Pictograph of a musical wind instrument with a reed, which is now written as 竽. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

仙.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 山 represents the sound. Simplified form of 僊.

们.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 门 represents the sound.

休.hint: Depicts a person (亻) resting under a tree (木).

伛.hint: A person 亻 forced into a box 区

估.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 古 represents the sound.

亃.gloss: name of a kind of animal

亿.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 乙 represents the sound. Simplified form of 億. Based on the original meaning "quiet; at rest". The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

今.hint: Depicts a closed mouth. Upside-down 曰. The meaning "now" is a phonetic loan.

仨.gloss: (coll.) three (cannot be followed by a measure word)

伯.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 白 represents the sound.

但.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 旦 represents the sound. Based on the original meaning "bare-chested". The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

了.hint: Pictograph of a young child, similar to 子, but without arms. Compare to 孑 (child only with right arm) and 孓 (child only with left arm). The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

亮.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 人 represents the meaning and 京 represents the sound. Depicts a person (人) in a high place (京).

仌.hint: Original form of 冰. Pictograph of the texture of ice (i.e. the crystalline lines as seen on ice).

他.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 也 represents the sound.

仿.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 方 represents the sound. Simplified form of 彷.

伥.gloss: ghost of one devoured by tiger

佇.hint: A calm 宁 person 亻

佐.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 左 represents the sound.

亘.hint: Originally written the same as 回 (return). Later lines were added above and below to distinguish the two characters.

什.hint: The character is based on the original meaning "file of ten soldiers". The modern meaning "what" is a phonetic loan.

仓.hint: Simplified form of 倉.  Depicts grain gathered together (合) behind a door (戶).

伐.hint: Depicts a weapon (戈) slashing a person's (亻) neck. Based on the original meaning "to behead someone". The meaning later shifted to "to attack" and "cut down".

伦.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 仑 represents the sound. Simplified form of 倫.

伪.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 为 represents the sound. Simplified form of 偽.

伶.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 令 represents the sound.

互.hint: Depicts two symmetric figures intertwining with each other.

亞.hint: Depicts a wooden structure where coffins are placed. Based on the original meaning "tomb". The current meaning "Asia" is a phonetic loan.

亡.hint: Depicts the tip of a knife blade (刀). Similar in origin to 方. Based on the original meaning "tip of a blade", now written as 芒. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

亦.hint: Pictograph of a person, with two dots at the armpits. Based on the original meaning "armpit", now written as 腋. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

仉.gloss: surname of the mother of Mencius

仰.hint: To exalt 卬 a person 亻

价.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 介 represents the sound. Simplified form of 價.

伸.hint: To extend your confidence 申 to another person 亻; 申 also provides the pronunciation

似.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 以 represents the sound.

作.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 乍 represents the sound.

佞.hint: Kindness 仁 toward a woman 女

你.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 尔 represents the sound.

侄.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 至 represents the sound. Simplified form of 姪.

倫.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 侖 represents the sound.

倭.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 委 represents the sound.

佴.hint: A second 耳 person 亻; 耳 also provides the pronunciation

俺.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 奄 represents the sound.

候.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 矦 represents the sound.

佾.gloss: a row or file of dancers

侧.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 则 represents the sound. Simplified form of 側.

侬.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 农 represents the sound. Simplified form of 儂.

倝.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 旦 represents the meaning and 㫃 represents the sound.

倦.hint: A curled-up 卷 person 亻; 卷 also provides the pronunciation

佼.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 交 represents the sound.

俤.gloss: (J) same as 面影 U+9762 U+5F71

倆.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 兩 represents the sound.

倖.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 幸 represents the sound.

倘.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 尚 represents the sound.

倻.gloss: phonetic used in Korean place names

來.hint: Pictograph of a stalk of wheat. The current meaning "come" is a phonetic loan. The original meaning "wheat" is now written as 麥.

侏.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 朱 represents the sound.

侷.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 局 represents the sound.

俎.hint: A slab of meat on a chopping board 且

俏.hint: A similar 肖 person 亻; 肖 also provides the pronunciation

信.hint: Conveys trusting (信) what a person (人) says (言). 人 is also a sound component.

個.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 固 represents the sound.

倏.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 犬 represents the meaning and 攸 represents the sound. Simplified form of 倐.

倞.hint: Someone 亻 living in the capital 京; 京 also provides the pronunciation

俊.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 夋 represents the sound. Simplified form of 儁.

俘.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 孚 represents the sound. Originally written as 孚, which depicts a hand (爪) capturing a child (子).

俠.hint: Someone 亻 who supports 夾 others; 夾 also provides the pronunciation

值.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 直 represents the sound.

佯.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 羊 represents the sound.

俸.hint: Wages offered 奉 to a person 亻; 奉 also provides the pronunciation

倉.hint: Depicts grain gathered together (合) behind a door (戶).

倡.hint: Someone 亻 who lights the way 昌; 昌 also provides the pronunciation

依.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 衣 represents the sound.

侩.hint: A person 亻 who organizes a meeting 会

侯.hint: Pictograph of an arrow (矢) hitting a target. Based on the original meaning "target (archery)". The meaning of this character has shifted over time and now means "marquis", likely because archery was associated with people of high ranking.

俨.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 严 represents the sound. Simplified form of 儼.

俭.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 佥 represents the sound. Simplified form of 儉.

俯.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 府 represents the sound. Simplified form of 俛.

們.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 門 represents the sound.

倾.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 顷 represents the sound. Simplified form of 傾.

佰.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 百 represents the sound.

佳.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 圭 represents the sound.

俱.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 具 represents the sound.

倩.hint: A young 青 person 亻; 青 also provides the pronunciation

侥.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 尧 represents the sound. Simplified form of 僥.

俐.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 利 represents the sound.

俑.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 甬 represents the sound.

俚.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 里 represents the sound.

俜.hint: A trusted 甹 person 亻;  甹 also provides the pronunciation

倒.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 到 represents the sound.

倚.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 奇 represents the sound.

借.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 昔 represents the sound.
