例.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 列 represents the sound.

侍.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 寺 represents the sound.

侨.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 乔 represents the sound. Simplified form of 僑.

促.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 足 represents the sound.

俳.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 非 represents the sound.

併.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 并 represents the sound.

侖.hint: Depicts an assembly (亼) of writings (冊).

侠.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 夹 represents the sound. Simplified form of 俠.

倍.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 咅 represents the sound.

供.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 共 represents the sound.

侵.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 𠬶 represents the sound.

係.hint: Depicts tying a rope (系) around a person's (亻) neck. 系 also represents the sound.

俗.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 谷 represents the sound.

俦.hint: Someone 亻 with you all your life 寿; 寿 also provides the pronunciation

倀.gloss: ghost of one devoured by tiger

债.hint: A person's 亻 duty 责; 责 also provides the pronunciation

侈.hint: A person 亻 with more than they need 多

保.hint: Depicts a person carrying a child on their back.

俩.hint: Simplified form of 倆.  Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 两 represents the sound.

使.hint: The characters 史 (history), 吏 (government official), 使 (cause; use; instruct), and 事 (matter; work; affair) are all etymologically related and all derive from the same ancient character, depicting a hand (又) holding a container for writing utensils.

便.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 𠓥 represents the sound. Originally written as 𠓥, which depicted a hand holding a whip with the 丙 component. Based on the original meaning "whip a person", now written as 鞭. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

俄.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 亻 represents the meaning and 我 represents the sound.

俞.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 舟 represents the meaning and 余 represents the sound. Original meaning unclear.

修.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 彡 represents the meaning and 攸 represents the sound.

俟.hint: A person 亻 waiting for something to finish 矣; 矣 also provides the pronunciation

塔.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 土 represents the meaning and 荅 represents the sound.

填.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 土 represents the meaning and 真 represents the sound.

塑.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 土 represents the meaning and 朔 represents the sound.

塾.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 土 represents the meaning and 孰 represents the sound.

塵.hint: Dust 土 kicked up by a fleeing deer 鹿

塊.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 土 represents the meaning and 鬼 represents the sound.

塢.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 土 represents the meaning and 烏 represents the sound.

塘.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 土 represents the meaning and 唐 represents the sound.

塗.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 土 represents the meaning and 涂 represents the sound.

塞.hint: Depicts two hands (廾) stuffing various objects (工) into an enclosed space (宀). The 土 (earth) component was added later.

塹.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 土 represents the meaning and 斬 represents the sound.

塋.hint: Grass 炏 covering a buried 土 casket 冖

墙.hint: Simplified form of 牆. Phonosemantic compound. 爿 represents the sound and 嗇 represents the meaning.

墅.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 野 represents the meaning and 土 represents the sound.

墩.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 土 represents the meaning and 敦 represents the sound. Simplified form of 墪.

墓.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 土 represents the meaning and 莫 represents the sound.

境.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 土 represents the meaning and 竟 represents the sound.

墨.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 土 represents the meaning and 黑 represents the sound. Originally written as 黑, which depicts a person whose face has been tattooed.

墊.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 土 represents the meaning and 執 represents the sound.

增.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 土 represents the meaning and 曾 represents the sound.

墜.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 土 represents the meaning and 隊 represents the sound.

墮.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 土 represents the meaning and 隋 represents the sound.

墻.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 土 represents the meaning and 嗇 represents the sound.

壁.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 土 represents the meaning and 辟 represents the sound.

壑.hint: A ditch 㕡 carved in the earth 土; 㕡 also provides the pronunciation

壓.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 土 represents the meaning and 厭 represents the sound.

外.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 卜 represents the meaning and 月 represents the sound.

夔.hint: Pictograph of Kui, a figure in ancient Chinese mythology.

壴.hint: Pictograph of a drum standing upright with a decoration on top.

夋.hint: Pictograph of a person squatting down. Based on the original meaning "to squat", now written as 蹲.

夷.hint: Originally depicted a rope wrapped around an arrow. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

壺.hint: Pictograph of a pot used for holding liquids.

夕.hint: Pictograph of the moon. Used to express "evening" or "night".

夜.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 夕 represents the meaning and 亦 represents the sound.

壬.hint: Pictograph of a warp beam used for holding silk in, also known as a spool. The modern meaning "9th heavenly stem" is a phonetic loan.

夂.hint: 夂 is a component form of 止, which is a pictograph of a foot.

大.hint: Depicts an adult man facing forward and standing erect. The meaning later shifted to "big".

失.hint: Depicts a person with their hair loose. Based on the original meaning "leisure; carefree", now written as 佚. The meaning later shifted to "lose" and "fail".

头.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 頁 represents the meaning and 豆 represents the sound. The simplified character 头 was adapted from the cursive form of the traditional character 頭.

壟.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 土 represents the meaning and 龍 represents the sound.

壶.hint: Simplified form of 壺. Pictograph of a pot used for holding liquids.

复.hint: Pictograph of a foot entering or exiting a building, representing the meaning "to return".

夏.hint: Pictograph of a person, represented by their head (頁) and feet (夂), being heated underneath the sun (日). The sun component was later omitted for brevity during the Warring States period.

夠.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 多 represents the meaning and 句 represents the sound.

夺.hint: Simplified form of 奪. Depicts a hand (寸) snatching a bird (隹). The top component was originally 衣 (clothes), depicting a person holding a bird in their clothes, but later it was reanalyzed as a phonetic component, written as either 兌 or 大.

壽.hint: The top component is a remnant of 老 (old). The origin of the bottom component is unclear.

夌.hint: Depicts a person (人) with their feet (夂) climbing out of a pit covered with a roof.

壍.gloss: moat around a city. a channel

多.hint: Depicts two pieces of meat together to convey the meaning "much" or "plentiful". In ancient China meat was a rare treat. Unrelated to 夕.

夢.hint: Depicts a person with an emphasized eye (𦰋) sleeping on a bed (爿), conveying the meaning "dream". 𦰋 also represents the sound. The 爿 (bed) component was later reanalyzed as meaning component 夕 (evening).

夨.hint: Depicts a person (大) with their head tilted.

夫.hint: Pictograph of a man. The top horizontal stroke either distinguishes it from the character 大 or depicts a hairpin, something that was only worn by adults.

壞.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 土 represents the meaning and 褱 represents the sound.

备.hint: Simplified form of 備. Depicts preparing a container for arrows to equip oneself for battle.

夥.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 多 represents the meaning and 果 represents the sound.

夬.hint: Depicts a hand (又) wearing a thumb ring. Thumb rings are typically used for archery to protect the archer's thumb when pulling back on the bowstring. Based on the original meaning "thumb ring". The meaning later shifted to "parted".

夗.hint: Pictograph of a dying animal lying down.

夭.hint: Depicts a person walking quickly. Original form of 走. Relation to current meaning unclear.

壕.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 土 represents the meaning and 豪 represents the sound.

壮.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 士 represents the meaning and 丬 represents the sound. Simplified form of 壯.

处.hint: Simplified form of 處.  Phonosemantic compound. 夂 represents the meaning and 虎 represents the sound.

夙.hint: Pictograph of a person working underneath the moon (夕) in the early morning when the moon is still visible.

天.hint: Depicts a person (大) with an emphasized head. Based on the original meaning "head". The meaning later shifted to "top", "high", and "sky".

央.hint: Pictograph of a person (大) with a cangue (torture device for punishing criminals) around his neck. People wearing such devices were not able to reach their mouth with their own hands, and were forced to beg for food.

士.hint: Pictograph of the head of an axe. Used to represent a soldier.

夃.hint: Pictograph a person with a mark indicating the location of the thigh. Original form of 股.

声.hint: Remnant of the character 殸 (stone chimes). Depicts a musical stone chime hung up on a rope. Simplified form of 聲.

壳.hint: Simplified form of 殼. Phonosemantic compound. 几 represents the meaning and 㱿 represents the sound.

太.hint: Addition of a dot to 大 (dà; big) to mean "very" or "extremely".

夯.hint: A load that takes great 大 strength 力

夹.gloss: be wedged or inserted between, pressed from two sides
夹.hint: Simplified form of 夾.  Pictograph of a person (大) being pushed by people on both sides.

够.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 多 represents the meaning and 句 represents the sound.

壤.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 土 represents the meaning and 襄 represents the sound.

壯.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 士 represents the meaning and 爿 represents the sound.

夾.gloss: be wedged or inserted between, pressed from two sides
夾.hint: Pictograph of a person (大) being pushed by people on both sides.

奕.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 大 represents the meaning and 亦 represents the sound.

奠.hint: Pictograph of a container of wine (酋) placed on a table as an offering for a sacrificial or memorial ceremony.

奖.hint: Simplified form of 獎.  Phonosemantic compound. 犬 represents the meaning and 將 represents the sound.

女.hint: Depicts a woman sitting or squatting down.

如.hint: Depicts a woman (女) obeying spoken (口) orders. Based on the original meaning "obey". The meaning later shifted to "be similar" and "like". 女 also serves as a sound component.

妍.hint: A woman 女 who appears forward or open 开

威.hint: Depicts a weapon (戌) used to force a woman (女) into submission.

姿.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 次 represents the sound.

娃.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 圭 represents the sound.

娜.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 那 represents the sound.

娣.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 弟 represents the sound.

娶.hint: Depicts taking (取) a woman (女) for a man to marry. 取 also represents the sound.

奎.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 大 represents the meaning and 圭 represents the sound.

奈.hint: A man 大 with spirit 示

奥.hint: Simplified form of 奧. Depicts two hands (廾) hiding rice (米) in a corner or a container. Based on the original meaning "to store". The meaning later shifted to "obscure", "profound", and "mysterious".

奮.hint: Depicts a bird (隹) lifting off in a field (田), starting to fly.

妄.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 亡 represents the sound.

妊.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 壬 represents the sound. Simplified form of 姙.

妟.hint: Depicts a woman (女) underneath the sun (日) on a calm day.

娇.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 乔 represents the sound. Simplified form of 嬌.

妝.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 爿 represents the sound.

妞.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 丑 represents the sound.

妪.hint: A woman 女 watching over her ward 区

妺.gloss: wife of the last ruler of the Xia dynasty

姓.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 生 represents the sound.

娱.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 吴 represents the sound. Simplified form of 娛.

妃.hint: Depicts a woman (女) and a man (卩) together.

妨.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 方 represents the sound.

姫.hint: A minister's 臣 consort 女

姬.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 𦣞 represents the sound.

姜.hint: Simplified form of 薑; grass 艹 provides the meaning while 畺 provides the pronunciation

奔.hint: Depicts a person (大) with more than one 止 (foot) components to indicate faster movement. Similar in origin to 走.

奴.hint: Depicts a hand (又) behind a woman (女) slave's back forcing her to work.

妹.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 未 represents the sound.

姑.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 古 represents the sound.

娠.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 辰 represents the sound.

好.hint: It is good (好) for a woman (女) and her child (子) to be together.

妥.hint: Depicts a hand (爫) calming a woman (女) down. The meaning later shifted to "adequate", "suitable", and "satisfactory".

妮.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 尼 represents the sound.

姒.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 以 represents the sound.

姗.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 册 represents the sound. Simplified form of 姍.

姨.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 夷 represents the sound.

姻.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 因 represents the sound.

奂.hint: Simplified form of 奐.  Depicts two hands (廾) taking something from a person's (人) house (穴). Based on the original meaning "take from someone's house". The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

契.hint: A contract signed by cutting 刀 notches 丰 in wood 木 (now changed to 大)

妈.hint: Simplified form of 媽. Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 马 represents the sound.

姥.hint: An older 老 woman 女; 老 also provides the pronunciation

奶.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 乃 represents the sound.

妓.hint: A working 支 woman 女; 支 also provides the pronunciation

委.hint: Depicts grain (禾) in a bent shape (𠃊).

娀.gloss: name of a concubine of Di Ku

夼.hint: A great 大 river bed 川

奪.hint: Depicts a hand (寸) snatching a bird (隹). The top component was originally 衣 (clothes), depicting a person holding a bird in their clothes, but later it was reanalyzed as a phonetic component, written as either 兌 or 大.

姐.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 且 represents the sound.

姘.hint: An affair 并 with a woman 女; 并 also provides the pronunciation

姚.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 兆 represents the sound.

奄.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 盍 represents the meaning and 甲 represents the sound. Based on the original meaning "to cover", now written as 掩.

奇.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 大 represents the meaning and 可 represents the sound.

奏.hint: A report about (above) the emperor 天

奞.gloss: the stride made by a man

奸.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 干 represents the sound. Simplified form of 姦.

妆.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 丬 represents the sound. Simplified form of 妝.

妇.hint: Simplified form of 婦.  Depicts a woman (女) using a broom (帚). Women were traditionally responsible for household chores in ancient times. 帚 also represents the sound.

娘.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 良 represents the sound. Simplified form of 孃.

奉.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 廾 and 扌 represent the meaning and 丰 represents the sound.

奩.hint: A man 大 packing a suitcase 區

妙.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 少 represents the sound.

姆.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 母 represents the sound.

姊.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 𠂔 represents the sound.

姪.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 至 represents the sound.

娄.hint: Simplified form of 婁.  Depicts two hands holding a woman's (女) waist. Based on the original meaning "hug", now written as 摟. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

娈.hint: Like 亦 a woman 女

奚.hint: Depicts a hand holding a rope tied to a slave. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

奧.hint: Depicts two hands (廾) hiding rice (米) in a corner or a container. Based on the original meaning "to store". The meaning later shifted to "obscure", "profound", and "mysterious".

妩.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 无 represents the sound. Simplified form of 嫵.

妲.gloss: concubine of last ruler of the Shang dynasty
妲.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 旦 represents the sound.

妻.hint: Pictograph of a hand grabbing a woman's hair to take her as a wife. In ancient China, women of marriageable age wore hairpins (compare with 每).

姦.hint: Someone who flirts with many women 女

娓.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 尾 represents the sound.

奋.hint: Simplified form of 奮.  Depicts a bird (隹) lifting off in a field (田), starting to fly.

奁.hint: A man 大 packing a suitcase 区

奐.hint: Depicts two hands (廾) taking something from a person's (人) house (穴). Based on the original meaning "take from someone's house". The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

套.hint: A cover has to be big (大) and long (镸) enough to wrap around what it is covering.

奢.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 大 represents the meaning and 者 represents the sound.

她.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 也 represents the sound. Similar to 他 (he).

妒.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 户 represents the sound. Simplified form of 妬.

妾.hint: Depicts a woman (女) with a damaged reputation (䇂 is a pictograph of a tool used to tattoo the face of criminals as punishment).

娛.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 吳 represents the sound.

妖.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 夭 represents the sound.

始.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 台 represents the sound. Based on the original meaning "elder sister", now written as 姒. The meaning later shifted to "first" and "start".

娅.gloss: mutual term of address used by sons-in-law
娅.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 亚 represents the sound. Simplified form of 婭.

娥.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 我 represents the sound.

娩.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 免 represents the sound.

婉.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 宛 represents the sound.

婧.hint: Like a young 青 woman 女; 青 also provides the pronunciation

婦.hint: Depicts a woman (女) using a broom (帚). Women were traditionally responsible for household chores in ancient times. 帚 also represents the sound.

婗.gloss: a new-born child the whimper of an infant

婆.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 波 represents the sound.

婚.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 昏 represents the sound.

婢.hint: A humble 卑 woman 女; 卑 also provides the pronunciation

婴.hint: Simplified form of 嬰. Depicts a woman (女) wearing shell ornaments (賏) around her neck. 賏 also represents the sound. Based on the original meaning "necklace". The meaning of this character has shifted over time and now means "infant" or "baby".

婪.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 林 represents the sound. Simplified form of 惏.

婭.gloss: mutual term of address used by sons-in-law
婭.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 亞 represents the sound.

婁.hint: Depicts two hands holding a woman's (女) waist. Based on the original meaning "hug", now written as 摟. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

婶.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 审 represents the sound. Simplified form of 嬸.

婊.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 表 represents the sound.

婵.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 单 represents the sound. Simplified form of 嬋.

婷.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 亭 represents the sound.

娼.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 昌 represents the sound.

媽.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 馬 represents the sound.

媾.hint: To know a woman's 女 secret 冓; 冓 also provides the pronunciation

嫌.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 兼 represents the sound.

嬉.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 喜 represents the sound.

孌.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 䜌 represents the sound.

官.hint: Depicts an official person (師) working in a governmental institution (宀).

客.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 各 represents the sound.

寇.hint: Depicts a hand holding a weapon (攴) attacking a person (元) inside a building (宀). Based on the original meaning, "to commit violence". The meaning later shifted to "invade", "enemy" and "bandits".

寶.hint: Depicts an assortment of valuable things, including jade (玉) and shells (貝), being stored safely under a roof (宀). The 缶 component represents the sound.

寻.hint: Simplified form of 尋. Pictograph of two outstretched arms measuring length. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

尊.hint: Depicts a hand (寸) offering a container of wine (酋).

尞.hint: Original form of 燎 (burn; set on fire). Depicts burning wood (木) with several dots around it, representing flame. The 日 (sun) and 火 (fire) components were added later.

嫂.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 叟 represents the sound.

嬋.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 單 represents the sound.

孜.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 攵 represents the meaning and 子 represents the sound.

宋.hint: Depicts a building (宀) made of wood (木). Based on the original meaning "dwelling". The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

宮.hint: Pictograph of a building (宀) with multiple rooms.

宰.hint: A barracks 宀 where slaves 辛 live

寓.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 禺 represents the sound. Simplified form of 庽.

寞.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 莫 represents the sound.

尃.hint: Depicts a hand (寸) scattering crops in a garden (甫). 甫 also represents the sound. Based on the original meaning "scatter". The meaning later shifted to "announce".

射.hint: Depicts a hand pulling back a bowstring with an arrow to shoot.

尋.hint: Pictograph of two outstretched arms measuring length. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

尧.hint: Simplified form of 堯.  Depicts a mound of dirt (土) on top of a platform (兀), representing the meaning "tall; lofty", later used to describe the legendary Emperor Yao.

嫵.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 無 represents the sound.

嬀.gloss: name of a river in Shanxi

孙.hint: Simplified form of 孫.  A grandchild is a small (小) child (子).

守.hint: Depicts a hand (寸) guarding a building (宀).

宪.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 先 represents the sound. Simplified form of 憲.

宵.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 肖 represents the sound.

密.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 山 represents the meaning and 宓 represents the sound.

寥.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 翏 represents the sound.

寺.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 寸 represents the meaning and 之 represents the sound. Based on the original meaning "to hold", now written as 持. The current meaning "temple" is a phonetic loan.

尜.hint: A diamond: small 小 to big 大 to small 小

尹.hint: Depicts a hand (又) holding a staff, held by people in positions of authority.

孕.hint: Pictograph of a pregnant woman (身) with a child (子) inside of her body.

孝.hint: Depicts a child (子) respecting an old man (老), conveying the meaning "filial piety".

孪.hint: Giving birth to a second 亦 child 子

孵.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 卵 represents the meaning and 孚 represents the sound.

尉.hint: Depicts a hand (寸) holding two stones over fire (火) to iron a person's (尸) back as a treatment for a disease. Based on the original meaning "to iron", now written as 熨. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

尗.hint: The smaller 小 of two brothers

嫔.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 宾 represents the sound. Simplified form of 嬪.

孑.hint: Depicts a child with a left arm but no right arm. Compare to 孓 (child with no left arm) and 了 (child with no arms).

孔.hint: Depicts an opening in a child's (子) head, representing the fontanel. Based on the original meaning "fontanel". The meaning of this character has shifted over time and now means "hole" and "opening".

孱.hint: Weak 孨 in body 尸

它.hint: Pictograph of a snake, now written as 蛇. The current use as a pronoun is a phonetic loan.

宗.hint: Depicts a spiritual (示) edifice (宀), like an ancestral shrine.

害.hint: Pictograph of a pointed spearhead. The distinguishing mark 口 was added later. Based on the original meaning "spearhead", now written as 𥎆. The meaning later shifted to "harm" and "injure".

寒.hint: Depicts a person (人) under a roof (宀) surrounding himself with grass bedding (茻) to try to stay warm in the cold weather. The 冫 (ice) component was added later.

将.hint: Simplified form of 將.  Depicts a hand (寸) taking a piece of meat (肉). 爿 is a sound component.

導.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 寸 represents the meaning and 道 represents the sound.

尼.hint: Depicts one person (匕) carrying another person (尸) on their back. Based on the original meaning "stop; approach". The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

媒.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 某 represents the sound.

嬰.hint: Depicts a woman (女) wearing shell ornaments (賏) around her neck. 賏 also represents the sound. Based on the original meaning "necklace". The meaning of this character has shifted over time and now means "infant" or "baby".

孩.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 子 represents the meaning and 亥 represents the sound.

寡.hint: Depicts a person living alone in a house (宀). The decorative strokes around the 頁 component corrupted into the unrelated 分.

寬.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 萈 represents the sound.

寸.hint: Pictograph of a hand with a line marking a spot on the wrist. In traditional Chinese medicine this spot on the wrist where the pulse can be taken is called the 寸口.

封.hint: Depicts using hands (寸) to cultivate plants (丰). Based on the original meaning "create a boundary with plants". The meaning later shifted to "divide off", "seal", and "letter".

媵.gloss: a maid who accompanies bride to her new home

嫏.gloss: the place where the supreme stores his books

嬌.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 喬 represents the sound.

孓.hint: Depicts a child with a right arm but no left arm. Compare to 孑 (child with no right arm) and 了 (child with no arms).

完.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 元 represents the sound. The 宀 component is used because putting on a roof completes the process of constructing a building.

宝.hint: Simplified form of 寶.  Depicts an assortment of valuable things, such as jade (玉), being stored safely under a roof (宀).

寂.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 叔 represents the sound.

寨.hint: A fortress 宀 with walls made of wood 木

寽.hint: Depicts a hand (寸) taking away an object from a hand (爫). Similar in origin to 𠬪. Original form of 捋.

寿.hint: Simplified form of 壽.  The top component is a remnant of 老 (old). The origin of the bottom component is unclear.

將.hint: Depicts a hand (寸) taking a piece of meat (肉). 爿 is a sound component.

尺.gloss: traditional Chinese unit of length ~ 1 foot
尺.hint: Origin unclear. Possibly a pictograph of a side view of a person with a mark on their leg indicating the length of one foot.

嬛.hint: To stare 睘 after a woman 女; 睘 also provides the pronunciation

學.hint: Depicts two hands (𦥑) teaching a child (子) under a roof (宀). 爻 represents the sound.

宜.hint: Originally depicted two pieces of meat (肉) on a sacrificial altar (且). Based on the original meaning "sacrificial meat". The meaning later shifted to "suitable".

宴.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 妟 represents the sound. Based on the original meaning "peace and happiness". The meaning later shifted to "banquet", "feast", and "to entertain".

宽.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 苋 represents the sound. Simplified form of 寬.

对.hint: Simplified form of 對. Depicts a hand (寸) holding a farming tool (丵) to develop land (土). Based on the original meaning "develop land".

尠.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 甚 represents the sound and 少 represents the meaning.

尤.hint: Pictograph of a hand with a wart on it. The original meaning "wart" is now written as 疣. The original meaning later expanded to "strange, bizarre" and "outstanding, special".

尿.hint: Depicts a person leaning over (尸) and passing water (水).

孤.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 子 represents the meaning and 瓜 represents the sound.

宿.hint: Depicts a person (亻) sleeping on a bamboo mat (㐁) under a roof (宀).

寅.hint: Originally written the same as 矢 (arrow). Later two hands (𦥑) were added to distinguish the characters.

實.hint: Depicts a string of money (貫) under a roof (宀). Based on the original meaning "rich; plentiful". The meaning later expanded to "solid", "fruit", and "true".

导.hint: Simplified form of 導.  Phonosemantic compound. 寸 represents the meaning and 道 represents the sound.

尌.hint: Depicts a hand (寸) cultivating a tree (木). The sound component 豆 was added later.

尬.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 尢 represents the meaning and 介 represents the sound.

嫁.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 家 represents the sound.

嫖.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 票 represents the sound.

嬸.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 審 represents the sound.

孃.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 襄 represents the sound.

字.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 子 represents the sound. The 宀 (roof) component is based on the original meaning "raise up children". The meaning later shifted to "educate", "word", and "writing".

孟.hint: A child 子 sitting on a throne 皿

孰.hint: Depicts a person with both hands outstretched (丮) offering food at a temple (享). Based on the original meaning "offer sacrifice". The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

室.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 至 represents the sound.

宦.hint: A minister 臣 in a statehouse 宀

寉.hint: Archaic variant of 鶴. Depicts a bird (隹) under a roof (宀).

專.hint: Depicts a hand (寸) spinning a wheel (叀). Based on the original meaning "turn", now written as 轉. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

尝.hint: Simplified form of 嘗.  Phonosemantic compound. 旨 represents the meaning and 尚 represents the sound.

尣.hint: Variant of 尢. Pictograph of a person with deformed legs.

媧.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 咼 represents the sound.

宁.hint: Pictograph of a container for storing things. Original form of 貯. In simplified Chinese 宁 is also used to mean "peaceful", while in traditional Chinese this meaning is written with a separate character 寧.

寝.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 𪧇 represents the meaning and 𠬶 represents the sound.

察.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 祭 represents the sound. Based on the original meaning "eaves". The meaning later shifted to "observe from above", "examine", and "inspect".

尨.hint: A hairy 彡 dog 犬

嫉.hint: An envious 疾 woman 女; 疾 also provides the pronunciation

嫦.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 常 represents the sound.

嬪.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 賓 represents the sound.

孀.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 霜 represents the sound.

孛.hint: Original form of 勃. Depicts plants thriving (丰) and a child (子) growing.

学.hint: Simplified form of 學.  Depicts two hands (𦥑) teaching a child (子) under a roof (宀). 爻 represents the sound.

孿.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 子 represents the meaning and 䜌 represents the sound.

宅.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 乇 represents the sound.

实.hint: Simplified form of 實.  Depicts a string of money (貫) under a roof (宀). Based on the original meaning "rich; plentiful". The meaning later expanded to "solid", "fruit", and "true". The 貫 component was changed to 头 for simplification.

审.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 申 represents the sound. Simplified form of 審.

宣.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 亘 represents the sound.

宾.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 兵 represents the sound. Simplified form of 賓.

寐.hint: Originally depicts a person (人) sleeping on a bed (爿) inside a house (宀). Later written into a phonosemantic compound. 𪧇 represents the meaning and 未 represents the sound.

寢.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 𪧇 represents the meaning and 𠬶 represents the sound.

尔.hint: Simplified form of 爾.  Pictograph of a sharp weapon with a sharp head and tail decorations on the end. Similar in origin to 朿. Original meaning unclear.

尘.hint: Small 小 flakes of earth 土

尚.hint: Depicts a large room. Based on the original meaning "high place". The meaning later shifted to "esteem".

就.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 京 represents the meaning and 尤 represents the sound. Based on the original meaning "high place". The meaning of this character has shifted over time and now means "achieve".

尴.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 尢 represents the meaning and 监 represents the sound. Simplified form of 尷.

媳.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 息 represents the sound.

嫗.hint: A woman 女 watching over her ward 區

孺.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 子 represents the meaning and 需 represents the sound.

安.hint: Depicts a woman (女) sitting under a roof (宀).

定.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 正 represents the sound.

宠.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 龙 represents the sound. Simplified form of 寵.

寄.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 奇 represents the sound.

寫.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 舄 represents the sound. Based on the original meaning "relocate". The meaning later shifted to "copy" and "write".

寵.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 龍 represents the sound.

小.hint: Depicts three small dots, representing the meaning "small". Originally the same character as 少. The small dots possibly represent grains of sand (沙).

少.hint: Depicts four dots, representing the meaning "few". Originally the same character as 小. The small dots possibly represent grains of sand (沙).

嫩.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 敕 represents the sound. Simplified form of 嫰.

孢.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 子 represents the meaning and 包 represents the sound.

宫.hint: Simplified form of 宮. Pictograph of a building (宀) with multiple rooms.

家.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and a remnant of 豭 represents the sound.

容.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 公 represents the sound.

寧.hint: Depicts a peaceful place (宀) with food to eat (皿). 心 represents the meaning and 丁 represents the sound.

寰.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 睘 represents the sound.

尖.hint: A point, small 小 over big 大

尢.hint: Pictograph of a person with deformed legs.

尽.hint: Simplified form of 盡.  Depicts a hand (又) using a brush to scrub dishes (皿) clean after one is finished eating. The simplified character 尽 was derived from the cursive form of 盡.

尾.hint: Depicts fur (毛) protruding from the posterior of a person (尸) wearing a decorative tail.

子.hint: Pictograph of a small child with its two arms waving.

宓.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 必 represents the sound.

宕.hint: A tunnel 宀 made in stone 石

宙.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 由 represents the sound.

富.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 畐 represents the sound.

寍.gloss: used as a term of comparison:-rather

寳.hint: Variant of 寶 with the 缶 component replaced with 尔.

對.hint: Depicts a hand (寸) holding a farming tool (丵) to develop land (土). Based on the original meaning "develop land".

尸.hint: Depicts a person with their knees bent to sit or squat.

媛.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 爰 represents the sound.

嬲.hint: A woman 女 flirting with two men 男

嬷.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 女 represents the meaning and 麽 represents the sound. Simplified form of 嬤.

存.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 子 represents the meaning and 才 represents the sound.

孚.hint: Depicts a hand (爫) capturing a child (子). In ancient times during war, the victors would kill the enemy's adult men and capture only the women and children. Based on the original meaning "captive", now written as 俘.

季.hint: 禾 represents short stalks of grain, 子 represents a young child. Based on the original meaning "youngest, small grains". The meaning later shifted to "crops", and "season".

孨.hint: Many abandoned children 子 representing an orphanage

宇.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 于 represents the sound.

宛.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 宀 represents the meaning and 夗 represents the sound. Based on the original meaning "building", now written as 館. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

尷.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 尢 represents the meaning and 監 represents the sound.

告.hint: Pictograph of a tongue extending from an open mouth. Visually similar to 舌 (tongue).

味.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 未 represents the sound.

呷.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 甲 represents the sound.

呈.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 𡈼 represents the sound.

呗.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 贝 represents the sound. Simplified form of 唄.

周.hint:
Depicts a carved jade object, now written as 彫/琱. The meaning later shifted to "circumference" and "cycle". Later the 口 component was added when 周 was used to refer to a geographical region to indicate that the character was only "mouthed", i.e. used for its sound.
In simplified Chinese 周 is also used to mean "week", while in traditional Chinese this meaning is written with a separate character 週.

呵.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 可 represents the sound.

呡.gloss: the corners of the mouth the lips

员.hint: Simplified form of 員.  Depicts the round opening (口) of a cooking pot (鼎). Based on the original meaning "round", now written as 圓. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

呢.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 尼 represents the sound. 口 (mouth) indicates that the character is only "mouthed", i.e. only used for its phonetic value.

呪.hint: Variant of 咒. Derived from 祝, with the 礻 (show) component being replaced by 口 (mouth) component when the meaning extended to "curse". Depicts a kneeling person (卩) opening their mouth (口) to pray for disaster to happen on someone.

呫.hint: To divine 占 with one's tongue 口

呆.hint: Depicts the mouth (口) being stuck and not moving, like wood (木), representing someone stupid or expressionless.

呬.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 四 represents the sound.

呻.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 申 represents the sound.

命.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 令 represents the sound and meaning. Based on the original meaning "command". The meaning later shifted to "fate" and "life".

呐.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 内 represents the sound. Simplified form of 吶.

呣.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 母 represents the sound.

呱.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 瓜 represents the sound.

呿.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 去 represents the sound.

呀.gloss: particle used to express surprise or mild emphasis
呀.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 牙 represents the sound.

呃.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 厄 represents the sound.

呜.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 乌 represents the sound. Simplified form of 嗚.

呼.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 乎 represents the sound.

呕.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 区 represents the sound. Simplified form of 嘔.

呛.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 仓 represents the sound. Simplified form of 嗆.

咧.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 列 represents the sound.

咱.hint: Pronoun referring to oneself (自). 口 is added to distinguish from 自.

品.hint: Triple of 口. Depicts several types of things together.

唸.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 念 represents the sound.

哩.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 里 represents the sound.

唠.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 劳 represents the sound. Simplified form of 嘮.

唯.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 隹 represents the sound.

哈.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 合 represents the sound.

响.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 向 represents the sound. Simplified form of 響.

哗.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 华 represents the sound. Simplified form of 嘩.

唱.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 昌 represents the sound.

唵.gloss: used in Buddhist texts to transliterate non-Chinese sounds
唵.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 奄 represents the sound.

咝.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 丝 represents the sound. Simplified form of 噝.

咬.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 交 represents the sound.

咳.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 亥 represents the sound.

哮.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 孝 represents the sound.

唏.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 希 represents the sound.

唐.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 庚 represents the sound.

咸.hint: Depicts a massacre with a weapon (戌), based on the original meaning "massacre". The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

咚.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 冬 represents the sound.

咻.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 休 represents the sound.

哥.hint: Duplicate of 可, which has a similar sound.

唢.hint: A mouth 口 blowing ⺌ through a conch 贝

咄.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 出 represents the sound.

咔.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 卡 represents the sound.

咽.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 因 represents the sound. Simplified form of 嚥.

咿.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 伊 represents the sound. Simplified form of 吚.

員.hint: Depicts the round opening (口) of a cooking pot (鼎). Based on the original meaning "round", now written as 圓. The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

哨.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 肖 represents the sound.

哪.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 那 represents the sound.

咀.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 且 represents the sound.

咅.hint: Originally the same character as 否. A distinguishing mark was added later to the character to differentiate it from 咅. The current meaning "to spit out" is a phonetic loan.

咒.hint: Derived from 祝, with the 礻 (show) component being replaced by 口 (mouth) component when the meaning extended to "curse". Depicts a kneeling person (卩) opening their mouth (口) to pray for disaster to happen on someone.

咙.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 龙 represents the sound. Simplified form of 嚨.

唷.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 育 represents the sound.

哀.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 衣 represents the sound.

哎.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 艾 represents the sound.

哦.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 我 represents the sound.

唬.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 虎 represents the sound.

唻.gloss: (modal particle similar to 呢[ne] or 啦[lā])

咆.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 包 represents the sound.

咋.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 乍 represents the sound.

咖.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 加 represents the sound.

咦.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 夷 represents the sound.

唔.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 吾 represents the sound.

唾.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 垂 represents the sound.

咯.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 各 represents the sound.

和.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 禾 represents the sound.

咎.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 处 represents the sound.

咐.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 付 represents the sound.

咕.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 古 represents the sound.

咨.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 次 represents the sound.

哑.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 亚 represents the sound. Simplified form of 啞.

唉.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 矣 represents the sound.

咠.hint: Depicts whispering (口) into someone's ears (耳).

咼.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 冎 represents the sound.

哆.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 多 represents the sound.

哒.gloss: a sound made to get a horse to move forward
哒.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 达 represents the sound. Simplified form of 噠.

哝.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 农 represents the sound. Simplified form of 噥.

哲.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 折 represents the sound.

哽.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 更 represents the sound.

唄.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 貝 represents the sound.

唫.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 金 represents the sound.

咊.hint: Variant of 和. Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 禾 represents the sound.

咏.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 永 represents the sound. Simplified form of 詠.

咩.hint: The sound a sheep 羊 makes with its mouth 口

咪.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 米 represents the sound.

咫.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 尺 represents the meaning and 只 represents the sound.

哔.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 毕 represents the sound. Simplified form of 嗶.

哺.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 甫 represents the sound. Simplified form of 餔.

唇.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 辰 represents the sound. Simplified form of 脣.

唑.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 坐 represents the sound.

唧.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 即 represents the sound.

唼.gloss: speaking evil. gobbling sound made by ducks

咣.gloss: the sound of large door closing

哟.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 约 represents the sound. Simplified form of 喲.

哭.hint: Depicts the howl (吅) of a dog (犬).

唁.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 言 represents the sound.

唅.hint: To hold 含 in the mouth 口; 含 also provides the pronunciation

唤.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 奂 represents the sound. Simplified form of 喚.

哄.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 共 represents the sound. Simplified form of 鬨.

哇.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 圭 represents the sound.

唆.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 夋 represents the sound.

售.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 雔 represents the sound.

啋.gloss: (Cant.) an interjection used to berate someone

啕.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 口 represents the meaning and 匋 represents the sound. Simplified form of 咷.

啚.hint: Depicts a granary (㐭) outside of city walls (囗). Original form of 鄙.

啇.hint: Originally the same character as 啻. Phonosemantic compound. 帝 represents the sound and 口 represents the meaning.

殿.hint: Depicts a weapon (殳) smacking a person's buttocks (𡱒). In ancient China, having one's buttocks smacked with a huge stick was one of the punishments criminals could have. Based on the original meaning, "to smack the buttocks". The meaning later shifted to "palace" and "hall", because buildings have an elevated appearance that stick out like buttocks.

毐.hint: Refers to someone who is not (毋) honorable (士). Name of an infamous person in Chinese history named Lao Ai (嫪毐).

毫.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 毛 represents the meaning and 高 represents the sound.

毯.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 毛 represents the meaning and 炎 represents the sound.

氢.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 气 represents the meaning and 𢀖 represents the sound.

檻.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 木 represents the meaning and 監 represents the sound.

櫃.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 木 represents the meaning and 匱 represents the sound.

歎.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 欠 represents the meaning and 堇 represents the sound.

氖.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 气 represents the meaning and 乃 represents the sound.

檳.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 木 represents the meaning and 賓 represents the sound.

櫍.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 木 represents the meaning and 質 represents the sound.

殄.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 歹 represents the meaning and 㐱 represents the sound. Originally written as 𠂈.

殆.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 歹 represents the meaning and 台 represents the sound.

殳.hint: Depicts a hand holding a weapon or tool.

氏.hint: Pictograph of a tool similar to a hammer that is shaped like deer antlers. Original meaning unclear.

氐.hint: Depicts a hammer hitting an object.

氓.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 民 represents the meaning and 亡 represents the sound.

氟.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 气 represents the meaning and 弗 represents the sound.

氫.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 气 represents the meaning and 巠 represents the sound.

氨.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 气 represents the meaning and 安 represents the sound.

氰.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 气 represents the meaning and 青 represents the sound.

此.hint: Origin unclear. Two possible explanations are (1) depicts a person (人) stopping (止), meaning "here", and (2) depicts a foot (止) kicking a person (人), based on an earlier meaning "to kick" (跐).

歹.hint: Variant of 歺. Pictograph of a wooden post or digging tool with a cracked bottom. Similar to 才 and 弋. The meaning later shifted to "bad" and "evil".

殁.hint: from the an unextended meaning of 沒

殉.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 歹 represents the meaning and 旬 represents the sound.

殖.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 歹 represents the meaning and 直 represents the sound.

毆.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 殳 represents the meaning and 區 represents the sound.

每.hint: Pictograph of a woman (母) with a hairpin in her hair. In ancient China, women of marriageable age wore a hairpin. Based on the original meaning "young woman of marriageable age". The current meaning is a phonetic loan.

毙.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 死 represents the meaning and 比 represents the sound. Simplified form of 斃.

毳.gloss: fine hair or fur on animals

氧.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 气 represents the meaning and 羊 represents the sound.

The meaning later shifted to "abundant" and "many" while it's other meaning used as the name of a dynasty at the end of the Shang dynasty is a phonetic loan.

毗.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 田 represents the meaning and 比 represents the sound. Simplified form of 毘.

毡.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 毛 represents the meaning and 占 represents the sound. Simplified form of 氈.

歺.hint: Pictograph of a wooden post or digging tool with a cracked bottom. Similar to 才 and 弋.

歡.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 欠 represents the meaning and 雚 represents the sound. 欠 (yawn) is a pictograph of a person with an open mouth, used here to represent a person joyfully laughing.

歧.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 止 represents the meaning and 支 represents the sound.

殼.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 几 represents the meaning and 㱿 represents the sound.

檐.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 木 represents the meaning and 詹 represents the sound. Simplified form of 簷.

檜.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 木 represents the meaning and 會 represents the sound.

母.hint: Pictograph of a woman kneeling, with two dots representing the two nipples that mothers use to feed their young.

毚.hint: Two rabbit-like animals (㲋 and 兔), alluding to the cunning of hares.

檾.gloss: grassy plant with fibres from which cloth is made

櫓.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 木 represents the meaning and 魯 represents the sound.

殞.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 歹 represents the meaning and 員 represents the sound.

殡.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 歹 represents the meaning and 宾 represents the sound. Simplified form of 殯.

毄.hint: Depicts a weapon (殳) hitting against a chariot (軎) in battle.

氜.hint: The gas 气 that comprises the sun 日

檸.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 木 represents the meaning and 寧 represents the sound.

權.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 木 represents the meaning and 雚 represents the sound.

欖.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 木 represents the meaning and 覽 represents the sound.

殯.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 歹 represents the meaning and 賓 represents the sound.

灰.hint: Depicts a hand (又) picking ashes left over from a fire (火).

灑.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 氵 represents the meaning and 麗 represents the sound.

灬.hint: 灬 is a component form of 火, which is a pictograph of fire.

灣.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 氵 represents the meaning and 彎 represents the sound.

灸.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 火 represents the meaning and 久 represents the sound.

灘.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 氵 represents the meaning and 難 represents the sound.

灵.hint: Simplified form of 靈.  Phonosemantic compound. 巫 represents the meaning and 霝 represents the sound.

灯.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 火 represents the meaning and 丁 represents the sound. Simplified form of 燈.

灼.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 火 represents the meaning and 勺 represents the sound.

災.hint: Depicts a fire (火) and a flood (𡿧).

灿.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 火 represents the meaning and 山 represents the sound. Simplified form of 燦.

灌.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 氵 represents the meaning and 雚 represents the sound.

炉.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 火 represents the meaning and 户 represents the sound. Simplified form of 爐.

炭.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 火 represents the meaning and 岸 represents the sound.

炽.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 火 represents the meaning and 只 represents the sound. Simplified form of 熾.

炅.hint: A flame 火 as bright as the sun 日

炬.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 火 represents the meaning and 巨 represents the sound.

炷.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 火 represents the meaning and 主 represents the sound. Originally written as 主, a pictograph of a torch.

炸.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 火 represents the meaning and 乍 represents the sound.

為.hint: Pictograph of a hand (又) guiding an elephant (象) to do work (in ancient China elephants were tamed to do work). Based on the meaning "to work; to do".

炏.hint: Duplicate of 火. Variant of 炎.

点.hint: Simplified form of 點. Phonosemantic compound. 黑 represents the meaning and 占 represents the sound.

炼.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 火 represents the meaning and 柬 represents the sound. Simplified form of 煉.

炕.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 火 represents the meaning and 亢 represents the sound. Simplified form of 匟.

炙.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 火 represents the meaning and 月 represents the sound.

炳.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 火 represents the meaning and 丙 represents the sound.

炖.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 火 represents the meaning and 屯 represents the sound. Simplified form of 燉.

炻.hint: Fired 火 clay 石; 石 also provides the pronunciation

炮.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 火 represents the meaning and 包 represents the sound.

炤.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 火 represents the meaning and 召 represents the sound.

炒.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 火 represents the meaning and 少 represents the sound.

炊.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 火 represents the meaning and 欠 represents the sound.

焿.gloss: name of a place in northeastern Taiwan

煤.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 火 represents the meaning and 某 represents the sound.

焉.hint: A bird 鳥 with a strange head

煎.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 灬 represents the meaning and 前 represents the sound.

烯.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 火 represents the meaning and 希 represents the sound.

烤.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 火 represents the meaning and 考 represents the sound.

焦.hint: Originally a pictograph of a wren. Based on the original meaning "wren", now written as 鷦. Later used as a phonetic loan for "burn", after which the fire (灬) component was added.

烕.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 戌 represents the sound and 火 represents the meaning.

斥.hint: Phonosemantic compond: 广 represents the meaning and 乇 represents the sound. Originally a variant form of 宅, based on the original meaning "to develop new land". The meaning later shifted to "expand", "get rid of", "rebuff", and "scold".

晓.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 日 represents the meaning and 尧 represents the sound. Simplified form of 曉.

旭.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 日 represents the meaning and 九 represents the sound.

晤.hint: Phonosemantic compound. 日 represents the meaning and 吾 represents the sound.

朝.hint: Depicts the early part of morning when the sun (日) can still be seen on the horizon between blades of grass (屮), and the moon (月) is still in the sky. Based on the original meaning "early morning". The meaning later shifted to "morning audience at court", "facing", "royal court", and "dynasty".

龺.hint: 龺 is a character component that does not have any meaning on its own and can have different explanations in different characters. For example in 朝, it depicts the sun (日) that can still be seen on the horizon between blades of grass (屮) while this component is sometimes used as an abbreviation of 倝.

⺮.hint: ⺮ is a component form of 竹, which is a pictograph of bamboo.
